+    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
+  }
+
   const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);
 
   if (!result.ok) {
+    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
     return { error: result.message };
   }
 
+  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
+
   if (result.effectiveRole === SystemRole.RH) {
     await createSession(result.user.id, null);
     redirect("/rh");
@@ -81,12 +91,20 @@
     return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
   }
 
+  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);
+
+  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
+    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
+  }
+
   const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);
 
   if (!result.ok) {
+    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
     return { error: result.message };
   }
 
+  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
   await createSession(result.user.id, null);
   redirect("/rh");
 }
diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
diff --git a/prisma/schema.prisma b/prisma/schema.prisma
index dc5c5f2790174e3b96e4220dfea9ca30f04dce1e..ab345194dcb4b5d80e71ebce71824290b5767ff3
--- a/prisma/schema.prisma
+++ b/prisma/schema.prisma
@@ -89,6 +89,15 @@
   cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
+}
+
 model UserCycle {
   id             String         @id @default(cuid())
   userId         String
diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

diff --git a/prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql b/prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql
new file mode 100755

@@ -0,0 +1,145 @@
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Cycle" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "year" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "startDate" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "endDate" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
+    "active" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
+    "completedAt" DATETIME,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Document" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "evaluationId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "mimeType" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "size" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    "storageKey" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "url" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UPLOADED',
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluationId") REFERENCES "Evaluation" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Evaluation" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "evaluatedId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "managerId" TEXT,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
+    "selfScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "managerScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "finalScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+    "current" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
+    "autoSubmittedAt" DATETIME,
+    "managerSubmittedAt" DATETIME,
+    "archivedAt" DATETIME,
+    "reopenedAt" DATETIME,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("managerId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluatedId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "EvaluationAnswer" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "evaluationId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "questionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "selectedOptionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "phase" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("selectedOptionId") REFERENCES "Option" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("questionId") REFERENCES "Question" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluationId") REFERENCES "Evaluation" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Option" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "questionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "label" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "score" DECIMAL NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("questionId") REFERENCES "Question" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Question" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "type" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "title" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Session" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "token" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "expiresAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "cycleId" TEXT,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES "User" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "User" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cpf" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "registration" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "passwordHash" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "globalRole" TEXT
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "UserCycle" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "role" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "employmentType" TEXT,
+    "department" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "jobTitle" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "managerId" TEXT,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("managerId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES "User" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "Cycle_year_key" ON "Cycle"("year" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "EvaluationAnswer_evaluationId_questionId_phase_key" ON "EvaluationAnswer"("evaluationId" ASC, "questionId" ASC, "phase" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "Session_token_key" ON "Session"("token" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "User_registration_key" ON "User"("registration" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "User_cpf_key" ON "User"("cpf" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "UserCycle_userId_cycleId_key" ON "UserCycle"("userId" ASC, "cycleId" ASC);

diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

diff --git a/prisma/schema.prisma b/prisma/schema.prisma
index dc5c5f2790174e3b96e4220dfea9ca30f04dce1e..ab345194dcb4b5d80e71ebce71824290b5767ff3
--- a/prisma/schema.prisma
+++ b/prisma/schema.prisma
@@ -89,6 +89,15 @@
   cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])

diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

   const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);

     redirect("/rh");
@@ -81,12 +91,20 @@
     return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
   }
 
+  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);
+
+  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
+    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
+  }
+
   const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);
 
   if (!result.ok) {
+    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
     return { error: result.message };
   }
 
+  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
   await createSession(result.user.id, null);
   redirect("/rh");
 }
diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

   cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+

diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {

+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Cycle" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "year" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "startDate" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "endDate" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
+    "active" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
+    "completedAt" DATETIME,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Document" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "evaluationId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "mimeType" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "size" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    "storageKey" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "url" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UPLOADED',
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluationId") REFERENCES "Evaluation" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Evaluation" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "evaluatedId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "managerId" TEXT,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
+    "selfScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "managerScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "finalScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+    "current" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
+    "autoSubmittedAt" DATETIME,
+    "managerSubmittedAt" DATETIME,
+    "archivedAt" DATETIME,
+    "reopenedAt" DATETIME,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("managerId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluatedId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "EvaluationAnswer" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "evaluationId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "questionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "selectedOptionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "phase" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("selectedOptionId") REFERENCES "Option" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("questionId") REFERENCES "Question" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluationId") REFERENCES "Evaluation" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Option" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "questionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "label" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "score" DECIMAL NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("questionId") REFERENCES "Question" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Question" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "type" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "title" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Session" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "token" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "expiresAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "cycleId" TEXT,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES "User" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "User" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cpf" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "registration" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "passwordHash" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "globalRole" TEXT
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "UserCycle" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "role" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "employmentType" TEXT,
+    "department" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "jobTitle" TEXT NOT NULL,

+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("managerId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,

diff --git a/prisma/schema.prisma b/prisma/schema.prisma
index dc5c5f2790174e3b96e4220dfea9ca30f04dce1e..ab345194dcb4b5d80e71ebce71824290b5767ff3
--- a/prisma/schema.prisma
+++ b/prisma/schema.prisma
@@ -89,6 +89,15 @@
   cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
+}
+
 model UserCycle {
   id             String         @id @default(cuid())
   userId         String
diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
+}
+
 model UserCycle {
   id             String         @id @default(cuid())
   userId         String
diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

+  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);

   const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);
 
   if (!result.ok) {
+    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
     return { error: result.message };
   }
 
+  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
+
   if (result.effectiveRole === SystemRole.RH) {
     await createSession(result.user.id, null);
     redirect("/rh");
@@ -81,12 +91,20 @@
     return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
   }
 
+  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);
+
+  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
+    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
+  }
+
   const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);
 
   if (!result.ok) {
+    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
     return { error: result.message };
   }
 
+  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
   await createSession(result.user.id, null);
   redirect("/rh");
 }
diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
diff --git a/prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql b/prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..ba6e35144bfe682b03b3c72637698bcdba3928b1
--- /dev/null
+++ b/prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,145 @@
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Cycle" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "year" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "startDate" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "endDate" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
+    "active" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
+    "completedAt" DATETIME,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Document" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "evaluationId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "mimeType" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "size" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    "storageKey" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "url" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UPLOADED',
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluationId") REFERENCES "Evaluation" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Evaluation" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "evaluatedId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "managerId" TEXT,
+    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
+    "selfScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "managerScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "finalScore" DECIMAL DEFAULT 0,
+    "version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+    "current" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
+    "autoSubmittedAt" DATETIME,
+    "managerSubmittedAt" DATETIME,
+    "archivedAt" DATETIME,
+    "reopenedAt" DATETIME,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("managerId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluatedId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "EvaluationAnswer" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "evaluationId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "questionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "selectedOptionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "phase" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("selectedOptionId") REFERENCES "Option" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("questionId") REFERENCES "Question" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("evaluationId") REFERENCES "Evaluation" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Option" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "questionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "label" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "score" DECIMAL NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("questionId") REFERENCES "Question" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Question" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "type" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "title" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Session" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "token" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "expiresAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "cycleId" TEXT,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES "User" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "User" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cpf" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "registration" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "passwordHash" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    "globalRole" TEXT
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "UserCycle" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "role" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "employmentType" TEXT,
+    "department" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "jobTitle" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "managerId" TEXT,
+    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("managerId") REFERENCES "UserCycle" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES "User" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "Cycle_year_key" ON "Cycle"("year" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "EvaluationAnswer_evaluationId_questionId_phase_key" ON "EvaluationAnswer"("evaluationId" ASC, "questionId" ASC, "phase" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "Session_token_key" ON "Session"("token" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "User_registration_key" ON "User"("registration" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "User_cpf_key" ON "User"("cpf" ASC);
+
+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "UserCycle_userId_cycleId_key" ON "UserCycle"("userId" ASC, "cycleId" ASC);

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c

+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}

+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

   const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);

diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+
+-- CreateTable

+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "questionId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "label" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "score" DECIMAL NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("questionId") REFERENCES "Question" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+);
+
+-- CreateTable
+CREATE TABLE "Question" (
+    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
+    "cycleId" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "type" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "title" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "description" TEXT NOT NULL,
+    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

+    "cycleId" TEXT,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("cycleId") REFERENCES "Cycle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+    FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES "User" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

+

diff --git a/prisma/schema.prisma b/prisma/schema.prisma
index dc5c5f2790174e3b96e4220dfea9ca30f04dce1e..ab345194dcb4b5d80e71ebce71824290b5767ff3
--- a/prisma/schema.prisma
+++ b/prisma/schema.prisma
@@ -89,6 +89,15 @@
   cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
+}
+
 model UserCycle {
   id             String         @id @default(cuid())
   userId         String
diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

codex
Os testes novos passaram. O `tsc --noEmit` segue sem emitir diagnóstico; vou só colher a saída final para confirmar se encerra limpo ou se o projeto já tinha alguma pendência de tipagem independente dessa mudança.

+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },

+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

diff --git a/lib/rate-limit.ts b/lib/rate-limit.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c3097681e5ddc113c45a91d3b7d5f95ea1c0551c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
+}
+

diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+-- CreateIndex
+CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "UserCycle_userId_cycleId_key" ON "UserCycle"("userId" ASC, "cycleId" ASC);
diff --git a/prisma/schema.prisma b/prisma/schema.prisma
index dc5c5f2790174e3b96e4220dfea9ca30f04dce1e..ab345194dcb4b5d80e71ebce71824290b5767ff3
--- a/prisma/schema.prisma
+++ b/prisma/schema.prisma
@@ -89,6 +89,15 @@
   cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
+}
+
 model UserCycle {
   id             String         @id @default(cuid())
   userId         String
diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

    44	export async function loginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
    45	  const parsed = loginSchema.safeParse({
    46	    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),

    72	    redirect("/rh");
    73	  }
    74	
    75	  await createSession(result.user.id, result.cycle.id);
    76	  redirect(`/${parsed.data.year}/${routeForRole(result.effectiveRole)}`);
    77	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
     2	
     3	export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
     4	export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
     5	
     6	function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
     7	  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
     8	}
     9	
    10	export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
    11	  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
    12	    where: {
    13	      cpf,
    14	      createdAt: {
    15	        gte: getWindowStart(),
    16	      },
    17	    },
    18	  });
    19	
    20	  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
    21	}
    22	
    23	export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
    24	  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
    25	    data: {
    26	      cpf,
    27	    },
    28	  });
    29	}
    30	
    31	export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
    32	  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
    33	    where: {
    34	      cpf,
    35	    },
    36	  });
    37	}

+++ b/lib/rate-limit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

diff --git a/prisma/schema.prisma b/prisma/schema.prisma
index dc5c5f2790174e3b96e4220dfea9ca30f04dce1e..ab345194dcb4b5d80e71ebce71824290b5767ff3
--- a/prisma/schema.prisma
+++ b/prisma/schema.prisma
@@ -89,6 +89,15 @@
   cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
 }
 
+model LoginAttempt {
+  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
+  cpf       String
+  ip        String   @default("unknown")
+  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
+
+  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
+}
+
 model UserCycle {
   id             String         @id @default(cuid())
   userId         String
diff --git a/tests/rate-limit.test.ts b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
new file mode 100755
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7e6bed87159da9c7d1a63cf6d31502ee59001578
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/rate-limit.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("@/lib/prisma", () => ({
+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

--------
user
No arquivo app/actions.ts do projeto /mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp, adicione verificacao de sessao e role em cada action conforme abaixo. Leia lib/auth.ts para entender as funcoes disponiveis (getSessionContext, requireSessionForYear, etc). REGRAS: (1) saveDraftAction e submitEvaluationAction: verificar sessao autenticada no inicio — se nao houver sessao retornar erro 'Nao autorizado.'. Remover actorUserCycleId do schema Zod e do payload — extrair o UserCycle do usuario autenticado diretamente da sessao+banco usando cycleId da avaliacao. (2) uploadDocumentsAction: verificar sessao e que o usuario autenticado e o evaluatedId da avaliacao — se nao for retornar erro 'Nao autorizado.'. (3) requestReevaluationAction: verificar que sessao existe e que o usuario tem globalRole RH — se nao retornar sem fazer nada. (4) completeCycleAction: mesma verificacao de role RH. (5) createCycleAction e importXmlAction: mesma verificacao de role RH. Sem comentarios. Rode npx tsc --noEmit ao final.
warning: Codex could not find system bubblewrap at /usr/bin/bwrap. Please install bubblewrap with your package manager. Codex will use the vendored bubblewrap in the meantime.
codex
Implementei a proteção contra brute force no login.

A mudança principal está em [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:34): `loginAction` e `rhLoginAction` agora verificam o bloqueio antes de autenticar, registram tentativas falhas e limpam o histórico após sucesso. A lógica foi isolada em [lib/rate-limit.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/rate-limit.ts:1), com `MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5`, janela de `15` minutos, `checkRateLimit`, `recordFailedAttempt` e `clearAttempts`. O model `LoginAttempt` foi adicionado em [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:92).

A migration foi aplicada. Como o banco `prisma/dev.db` já existia sem histórico de migrations, precisei registrar um baseline em [prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql:1) e depois o Prisma criou/aplicou [prisma/migrations/20260415194150_add_login_attempts/migration.sql](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/migrations/20260415194150_add_login_attempts/migration.sql:1). Também adicionei teste unitário da regra em [tests/rate-limit.test.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/tests/rate-limit.test.ts:1).

Validação: `npm test -- --run tests/rate-limit.test.ts` passou. `npx tsc --noEmit` não retornou diagnóstico dentro do timeout de 20s, então não tenho uma conclusão útil de tipagem global do projeto inteiro.

   const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);

   const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
+
+export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
+export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
+
+function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
+  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
+}
+
+export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
+  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+      createdAt: {
+        gte: getWindowStart(),
+      },
+    },
+  });
+
+  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
+}
+
+export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.create({
+    data: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}
+
+export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {
+  await prisma.loginAttempt.deleteMany({
+    where: {
+      cpf,
+    },
+  });
+}

+import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+
+const { prismaMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
+  prismaMock: {
+    loginAttempt: {
+      count: vi.fn(),
+      create: vi.fn(),
+      deleteMany: vi.fn(),
+    },
+  },
+}));
+

+  prisma: prismaMock,
+}));
+
+import {
+  MAX_ATTEMPTS,
+  WINDOW_MINUTES,
+  checkRateLimit,
+  clearAttempts,
+  recordFailedAttempt,
+} from "@/lib/rate-limit";
+
+describe("rate limit", () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("blocks cpf after max attempts inside the window", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS);
+
+    const result = await checkRateLimit("12345678901");
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({ blocked: true });
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.count).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+        createdAt: {
+          gte: expect.any(Date),
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    const [{ where }] = prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mock.calls[0];
+    const diff = Date.now() - where.createdAt.gte.getTime();
+
+    expect(diff).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 - 1000);
+    expect(diff).toBeLessThanOrEqual(WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000 + 1000);
+  });
+
+  it("allows cpf below the limit", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.count.mockResolvedValue(MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1);
+
+    await expect(checkRateLimit("12345678901")).resolves.toEqual({ blocked: false });
+  });
+
+  it("records failed attempts", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.create.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await recordFailedAttempt("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      data: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("clears attempts after successful login", async () => {
+    prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue(undefined);
+
+    await clearAttempts("12345678901");
+
+    expect(prismaMock.loginAttempt.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
+      where: {
+        cpf: "12345678901",
+      },
+    });
+  });
+});

47,152
Implementei a proteção contra brute force no login.

A mudança principal está em [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:34): `loginAction` e `rhLoginAction` agora verificam o bloqueio antes de autenticar, registram tentativas falhas e limpam o histórico após sucesso. A lógica foi isolada em [lib/rate-limit.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/rate-limit.ts:1), com `MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5`, janela de `15` minutos, `checkRateLimit`, `recordFailedAttempt` e `clearAttempts`. O model `LoginAttempt` foi adicionado em [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:92).

A migration foi aplicada. Como o banco `prisma/dev.db` já existia sem histórico de migrations, precisei registrar um baseline em [prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql:1) e depois o Prisma criou/aplicou [prisma/migrations/20260415194150_add_login_attempts/migration.sql](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/migrations/20260415194150_add_login_attempts/migration.sql:1). Também adicionei teste unitário da regra em [tests/rate-limit.test.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/tests/rate-limit.test.ts:1).

Validação: `npm test -- --run tests/rate-limit.test.ts` passou. `npx tsc --noEmit` não retornou diagnóstico dentro do timeout de 20s, então não tenho uma conclusão útil de tipagem global do projeto inteiro.
