 succeeded in 0ms:
"use server";

import {
  CycleStatus,
  EmploymentType,
  EvaluationPhase,
  EvaluationStatus,
  Prisma,
  QuestionType,
  SystemRole,
} from "@prisma/client";
import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache";
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
import { z } from "zod";

import {
  clearSession,
  createSession,
  getSessionContext,
  routeForRole,
  verifyCredentials,
  verifyGlobalRhCredentials,
} from "@/lib/auth";
import {
  calculateScore,
  canAutosave,
  getDeadline,
  getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType,
  resolveFinalStatus,
} from "@/lib/evaluation";
import { cloneQuestionSet, decimalToNumber, ensureCurrentEvaluation, getEvaluationWithRelations } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import { getDefaultOptions, QUESTION_BANK } from "@/lib/question-bank";
import { checkRateLimit, clearAttempts, recordFailedAttempt } from "@/lib/rate-limit";
import { storeDocumentInDrive } from "@/lib/storage";
import { parseXmlEmployees } from "@/lib/xml";

const loginSchema = z.object({
  cpf: z.string().min(11),
  password: z.string().min(11),
  year: z.coerce.number().int(),
});

export async function loginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const parsed = loginSchema.safeParse({
    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    year: formData.get("year"),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
  }

  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
  }

  const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);

  if (!result.ok) {
    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    return { error: result.message };
  }

  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (result.effectiveRole === SystemRole.RH) {
    await createSession(result.user.id, null);
    redirect("/rh");
  }

  await createSession(result.user.id, result.cycle.id);
  redirect(`/${parsed.data.year}/${routeForRole(result.effectiveRole)}`);
}

const globalLoginSchema = z.object({
  cpf: z.string().min(11),
  password: z.string().min(11),
});

export async function rhLoginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const parsed = globalLoginSchema.safeParse({
    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
  }

  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
  }

  const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);

  if (!result.ok) {
    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    return { error: result.message };
  }

  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
  await createSession(result.user.id, null);
  redirect("/rh");
}

export async function logoutAction(year?: number, redirectTo?: string) {
  await clearSession();
  redirect(redirectTo ?? `/${year}/login`);
}

const draftSchema = z.object({
  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
});

export async function saveDraftAction(input: z.infer<typeof draftSchema>) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = draftSchema.safeParse(input);

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Carga de rascunho inválida." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const deadline = getDeadline(evaluation.cycle.startDate, "self");

  if (!canAutosave(evaluation.status, deadline)) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Prazo encerrado para salvar rascunho." };
  }

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Rascunho não autorizado." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    for (const [questionId, optionId] of Object.entries(parsed.data.answers)) {
      await tx.evaluationAnswer.upsert({
        where: {
          evaluationId_questionId_phase: {
            evaluationId: evaluation.id,
            questionId,
            phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
          },
        },
        create: {
          evaluationId: evaluation.id,
          questionId,
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
          phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
        },
        update: {
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
        },
      });
    }

    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
      where: {
        id: {
          in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers),
        },
      },
    });

    const score = calculateScore(
      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
    );

    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        status: EvaluationStatus.DRAFT,
        selfScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
      },
    });
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);

  return { ok: true as const, message: "Alterações salvas automaticamente." };
}

const submitSchema = z.object({
  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
  phase: z.enum(["self", "manager"]),
  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
});

export async function submitEvaluationAction(input: z.infer<typeof submitSchema>) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = submitSchema.safeParse(input);

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Submissão inválida." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const phase = parsed.data.phase === "self" ? EvaluationPhase.SELF : EvaluationPhase.MANAGER;
  const isSelf = phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF;

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  if (isSelf && evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
  }

  if (!isSelf && evaluation.managerId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
  }

  const questionCount = await prisma.question.count({
    where: {
      cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      type: getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
    },
  });

  if (Object.keys(parsed.data.answers).length !== questionCount) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Preencha todos os fatores obrigatórios." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    for (const [questionId, optionId] of Object.entries(parsed.data.answers)) {
      await tx.evaluationAnswer.upsert({
        where: {
          evaluationId_questionId_phase: {
            evaluationId: evaluation.id,
            questionId,
            phase,
          },
        },
        create: {
          evaluationId: evaluation.id,
          questionId,
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
          phase,
        },
        update: {
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
        },
      });
    }

    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
      where: {
        id: { in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers) },
      },
    });

    const score = calculateScore(
      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
    );

    const nextStatus = resolveFinalStatus(evaluation.status, parsed.data.phase);

    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        status: nextStatus,
        selfScore: isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.selfScore,
        managerScore: !isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.managerScore,
        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(isSelf ? score : score),
        autoSubmittedAt: isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.autoSubmittedAt,
        managerSubmittedAt: !isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.managerSubmittedAt,
      },
    });
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/rh`);

  return { ok: true as const, redirectTo: `/${evaluation.cycle.year}/${isSelf ? "servidor" : "chefia"}` };
}

export async function uploadDocumentsAction(formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const evaluationId = String(formData.get("evaluationId") ?? "");
  const files = formData.getAll("files").filter((file): file is File => file instanceof File);

  if (!evaluationId || files.length === 0) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nenhum arquivo enviado." };
  }

import { EvaluationStatus, Prisma } from "@prisma/client";

import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export async function ensureCurrentEvaluation(input: {
  cycleId: string;
  evaluatedId: string;
  managerId?: string | null;
}) {
  const existing = await prisma.evaluation.findFirst({
    where: {
      cycleId: input.cycleId,
      evaluatedId: input.evaluatedId,
      current: true,
    },
  });

  if (existing) {
    return existing;
  }

  return prisma.evaluation.create({
    data: {
      cycleId: input.cycleId,
      evaluatedId: input.evaluatedId,
      managerId: input.managerId ?? null,
      status: EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
    },
  });
}

export async function getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId: string) {
  return prisma.evaluation.findUnique({
    where: { id: evaluationId },
    include: {
      cycle: true,
      documents: {
        orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      },
      evaluated: {
        include: {
          user: true,
          manager: {
            include: {
              user: true,
            },
          },
        },
      },
      manager: {
        include: {
          user: true,
        },
      },
      answers: {
        include: {
          question: {
            include: {
              options: {
                orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" },
              },
            },
          },
          selectedOption: true,
        },
      },
    },
  });
}

export async function cloneQuestionSet(sourceCycleId: string, targetCycleId: string) {
  const questions = await prisma.question.findMany({
    where: { cycleId: sourceCycleId },
    include: { options: { orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" } } },
    orderBy: [{ type: "asc" }, { sortOrder: "asc" }],
  });

  for (const question of questions) {
    await prisma.question.create({
      data: {
        cycleId: targetCycleId,
        type: question.type,
        title: question.title,
        description: question.description,
        sortOrder: question.sortOrder,
        options: {
          create: question.options.map((option) => ({
            label: option.label,
            description: option.description,
            score: option.score,
            sortOrder: option.sortOrder,
          })),
        },
      },
    });
  }
}

export function decimalToNumber(value: Prisma.Decimal | number | null | undefined): number {
  return value ? Number(value) : 0;
}

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '341,860p' app/actions.ts" in /mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp
 succeeded in 0ms:
  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  if ((evaluation.documents?.length ?? 0) + files.length > 10) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Limite máximo de 10 comprovantes por servidor." };
  }

  const uploaded = [];

  for (const file of files) {
    if (file.type !== "application/pdf") {
      return { ok: false as const, message: "Apenas arquivos PDF são permitidos." };
    }

    if (file.size > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
      return { ok: false as const, message: "Cada PDF deve ter no máximo 10MB." };
    }

    const sanitizedFileName =
      file.name
        .replace(/(\.\.(\/|\\|$))+/g, "")
        .replace(/[\\/]+/g, "")
        .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]/g, "")
        .replace(/\.{2,}/g, ".")
        .replace(/^\.+/, "") || "documento.pdf";

    const stored = await storeDocumentInDrive({
      buffer: Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer()),
      fileName: sanitizedFileName,
      cycleYear: evaluation.cycle.year,
      userFolder: `${evaluation.evaluated.user.name.replace(/\s+/g, "_")}_${evaluation.evaluated.user.registration.replace(/\s+/g, "")}`,
    });

    const document = await prisma.document.create({
      data: {
        evaluationId,
        name: sanitizedFileName,
        mimeType: file.type,
        size: file.size,
        storageKey: stored.storageKey,
        url: stored.url,
      },
    });

    uploaded.push({
      id: document.id,
      name: document.name,
      url: document.url,
      size: document.size,
    });
  }

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  return { ok: true as const, documents: uploaded };
}

const cycleSchema = z.object({
  year: z.coerce.number().int().min(2020).max(2100),
});

export async function createCycleAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = cycleSchema.safeParse({
    year: formData.get("year"),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Ano do ciclo inválido." };
  }

  const existing = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { year: parsed.data.year } });

  if (existing) {
    return { error: "Já existe um ciclo para esse ano." };
  }

  const openCycle = await prisma.cycle.findFirst({
    where: { status: CycleStatus.OPEN },
    orderBy: { year: "desc" },
  });

  if (openCycle) {
    return {
      error: `Finalize o projeto ${openCycle.year} antes de criar um novo ciclo.`,
    };
  }

  const latestCycle = await prisma.cycle.findFirst({
    orderBy: { year: "desc" },
  });

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.create({
    data: {
      year: parsed.data.year,
      name: `Ciclo ${parsed.data.year}`,
      startDate: new Date(`${parsed.data.year}-04-01T00:00:00.000Z`),
      endDate: new Date(`${parsed.data.year}-04-30T23:59:59.999Z`),
      status: CycleStatus.OPEN,
      active: true,
    },
  });

  await prisma.cycle.updateMany({
    where: { NOT: { id: cycle.id } },
    data: { active: false },
  });

  if (latestCycle) {
    await cloneQuestionSet(latestCycle.id, cycle.id);
  } else {
    for (const [type, questions] of Object.entries(QUESTION_BANK)) {
      const questionType = type as QuestionType;
      for (const [index, question] of questions.entries()) {
        await prisma.question.create({
          data: {
            cycleId: cycle.id,
            type: questionType,
            title: question.title,
            description: question.description,
            sortOrder: index + 1,
            options: {
              create: getDefaultOptions(questionType).map((option, optionIndex) => ({
                label: option.label,
                score: option.score,
                description: question.options[optionIndex],
                sortOrder: optionIndex + 1,
              })),
            },
          },
        });
      }
    }
  }

  revalidatePath(`/${parsed.data.year}/rh`);
  revalidatePath("/rh");
  return { success: `Ciclo ${parsed.data.year} criado com sucesso.` };
}

export async function importXmlAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const cycleId = String(formData.get("cycleId") ?? "");
  const xmlFile = formData.get("xml");

  if (!cycleId || !(xmlFile instanceof File)) {
    return { error: "Envie um arquivo XML válido." };
  }

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: cycleId } });

  if (!cycle) {
    return { error: "Ciclo não encontrado." };
  }

  const xml = await xmlFile.text();
  const employees = parseXmlEmployees(xml);

  if (employees.length === 0) {
    return { error: "Nenhum registro reconhecido no XML." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    const managerMap = new Map();

    for (const employee of employees) {
      const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(employee.cpf, 10);
      const user = await tx.user.upsert({
        where: { cpf: employee.cpf },
        create: {
          cpf: employee.cpf,
          name: employee.nome,
          registration: employee.matricula,
          passwordHash,
        },
        update: {
          name: employee.nome,
          registration: employee.matricula,
        },
      });

      const isManager = employees.some((candidate) => candidate.chefiaCpf === employee.cpf);
      const employmentType =
        employee.vinculo.toUpperCase().includes("PROB") ? EmploymentType.PROBATORIO : EmploymentType.EFETIVO;

      const userCycle = await tx.userCycle.upsert({
        where: {
          userId_cycleId: {
            userId: user.id,
            cycleId,
          },
        },
        create: {
          userId: user.id,
          cycleId,
          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
          department: employee.secretaria,
          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
        },
        update: {
          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
          department: employee.secretaria,
          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
        },
      });

      managerMap.set(employee.cpf, userCycle.id);
    }

    for (const employee of employees) {
      if (!employee.chefiaCpf) {
        continue;
      }

      const employeeUser = await tx.user.findUnique({ where: { cpf: employee.cpf } });
      const employeeCycle = employeeUser
        ? await tx.userCycle.findUnique({
            where: {
              userId_cycleId: {
                userId: employeeUser.id,
                cycleId,
              },
            },
          })
        : null;

      if (!employeeCycle) {
        continue;
      }

      await tx.userCycle.update({
        where: { id: employeeCycle.id },
        data: {
          managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
        },
      });

      const existingEvaluation = await tx.evaluation.findFirst({
        where: {
          cycleId,
          evaluatedId: employeeCycle.id,
          current: true,
        },
      });

      if (existingEvaluation) {
        await tx.evaluation.update({
          where: { id: existingEvaluation.id },
          data: {
            managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
          },
        });
      } else {
        await tx.evaluation.create({
          data: {
            cycleId,
            evaluatedId: employeeCycle.id,
            managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
            status: EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
          },
        });
      }
    }
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
  revalidatePath("/rh");
  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
  return { success: `${employees.length} registro(s) importado(s) com sucesso.` };
}

export async function requestReevaluationAction(evaluationId: string) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return;
  }

  const evaluation = await prisma.evaluation.findUnique({
    where: { id: evaluationId },
    include: {
      answers: true,
      documents: true,
    },
  });

  if (!evaluation) {
    return;
  }

  const selfAnswers = evaluation.answers.filter((answer) => answer.phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF);
  const hasSelfEvaluation =
    selfAnswers.length > 0 ||
    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE ||
    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE ||
    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED;

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        current: false,
        status: EvaluationStatus.ARCHIVED,
        archivedAt: new Date(),
      },
    });

    await tx.evaluation.create({
      data: {
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
        evaluatedId: evaluation.evaluatedId,
        managerId: evaluation.managerId,
        version: evaluation.version + 1,
        current: true,
        status: hasSelfEvaluation ? EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE : EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
        selfScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
        managerScore: new Prisma.Decimal(0),
        finalScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
        autoSubmittedAt: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.autoSubmittedAt ?? new Date() : null,
        managerSubmittedAt: null,
        reopenedAt: new Date(),
        answers: {
          create: selfAnswers.map((answer) => ({
            questionId: answer.questionId,
            selectedOptionId: answer.selectedOptionId,
            phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
          })),
        },
        documents: {
          create: evaluation.documents.map((document) => ({
            name: document.name,
            mimeType: document.mimeType,
            size: document.size,
            storageKey: document.storageKey,
            url: document.url,
            status: document.status,
          })),
        },
      },
    });
  });

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: evaluation.cycleId } });

  if (cycle) {
    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
    revalidatePath("/rh");
    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/servidor`);
  }
}

export async function completeCycleAction(cycleId: string) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({
    where: { id: cycleId },
  });

  if (!cycle) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Projeto não encontrado." };
  }

  const pendingCount = await prisma.evaluation.count({
    where: {
      cycleId,
      current: true,
      status: {
        not: EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED,
      },
    },
  });

  if (pendingCount > 0) {
    return {
      ok: false as const,
      message: "Ainda existem avaliações pendentes. Finalize o ciclo somente após concluir todo o fluxo.",
    };
  }

  await prisma.cycle.update({
    where: { id: cycleId },
    data: {
      status: CycleStatus.COMPLETED,
      active: false,
      completedAt: new Date(),
    },
  });

  revalidatePath("/rh");
  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);

  return { ok: true as const, message: `Projeto ${cycle.year} finalizado.` };
}

FILE app/[year]/layout.tsx
import { notFound } from "next/navigation";

import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export default async function YearLayout({
  children,
  params,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
  params: Promise<{ year: string }>;
}>) {
  const { year } = await params;
  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({
    where: { year: Number(year) },
  });

  if (!cycle) {
    notFound();
  }

  return <>{children}</>;
}

    52	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())
    53	  cpf          String      @unique
    54	  name         String
    55	  registration String      @unique
    56	  passwordHash String
    57	  globalRole   SystemRole?
    58	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())
    59	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt
    60	  userCycles   UserCycle[]
    61	  sessions     Session[]
    62	}
    63	
    64	model Cycle {
    65	  id          String       @id @default(cuid())
    66	  year        Int          @unique
    67	  name        String
    68	  startDate   DateTime
    69	  endDate     DateTime
    70	  status      CycleStatus  @default(OPEN)
    71	  active      Boolean      @default(false)
    72	  completedAt DateTime?
    73	  createdAt   DateTime     @default(now())
    74	  updatedAt   DateTime     @updatedAt
    75	  userCycles  UserCycle[]
    76	  questions   Question[]
    77	  evaluations Evaluation[]
    78	  sessions    Session[]
    79	}
    80	
    81	model Session {
    82	  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
    83	  token     String   @unique
    84	  expiresAt DateTime
    85	  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
    86	  userId    String
    87	  cycleId   String?
    88	  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
    89	  cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
    90	}
    91	
    92	model LoginAttempt {
    93	  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
    94	  cpf       String
    95	  ip        String   @default("unknown")
    96	  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
    97	
    98	  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
    99	}
   100	
   101	model UserCycle {
   102	  id             String         @id @default(cuid())
   103	  userId         String
   104	  cycleId        String
   105	  role           SystemRole
   106	  employmentType EmploymentType?
   107	  department     String
   108	  jobTitle       String
   109	  managerId      String?
   110	  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())
   111	  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt
   112	  user           User           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   113	  cycle          Cycle          @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   114	  manager        UserCycle?     @relation("Management", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
   115	  subordinates   UserCycle[]    @relation("Management")
   116	  evaluations    Evaluation[]   @relation("EvaluatedUser")
   117	  managerReviews Evaluation[]   @relation("ManagerUser")
   118	
   119	  @@unique([userId, cycleId])
   120	}
   121	
   122	model Question {
   123	  id          String       @id @default(cuid())
   124	  cycleId      String
   125	  type        QuestionType
   126	  title       String
   127	  description String
   128	  sortOrder   Int
   129	  cycle       Cycle        @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   130	  options     Option[]
   131	  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]
   132	}
   133	
   134	model Option {
   135	  id          String             @id @default(cuid())
   136	  questionId  String
   137	  label       String
   138	  description String
   139	  score       Decimal
   140	  sortOrder   Int
   141	  question    Question           @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   142	  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]
   143	}
   144	
   145	model Evaluation {
   146	  id                String             @id @default(cuid())
   147	  cycleId           String
   148	  evaluatedId       String
   149	  managerId         String?
   150	  status            EvaluationStatus   @default(PENDING)
   151	  selfScore         Decimal?           @default(0)
   152	  managerScore      Decimal?           @default(0)
   153	  finalScore        Decimal?           @default(0)
   154	  version           Int                @default(1)
   155	  current           Boolean            @default(true)
   156	  autoSubmittedAt   DateTime?
   157	  managerSubmittedAt DateTime?
   158	  archivedAt        DateTime?
   159	  reopenedAt        DateTime?
   160	  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())
   161	  updatedAt         DateTime           @updatedAt
   162	  cycle             Cycle              @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   163	  evaluated         UserCycle          @relation("EvaluatedUser", fields: [evaluatedId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   164	  manager           UserCycle?         @relation("ManagerUser", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
   165	  answers           EvaluationAnswer[]
   166	  documents         Document[]
   167	}
   168	
   169	model EvaluationAnswer {
   170	  id               String          @id @default(cuid())
   171	  evaluationId     String
   172	  questionId       String
   173	  selectedOptionId String
   174	  phase            EvaluationPhase
   175	  createdAt        DateTime        @default(now())
   176	  updatedAt        DateTime        @updatedAt
   177	  evaluation       Evaluation      @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   178	  question         Question        @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   179	  selectedOption   Option          @relation(fields: [selectedOptionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   180	
   181	  @@unique([evaluationId, questionId, phase])
   182	}
   183	
   184	model Document {
   185	  id           String         @id @default(cuid())
   186	  evaluationId String
   187	  name         String
   188	  mimeType     String
   189	  size         Int
   190	  storageKey   String
   191	  url          String
   192	  status       DocumentStatus @default(UPLOADED)
   193	  createdAt    DateTime       @default(now())
   194	  evaluation   Evaluation     @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   195	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	"use server";
     2	
     3	import {
     4	  CycleStatus,
     5	  EmploymentType,
     6	  EvaluationPhase,
     7	  EvaluationStatus,
     8	  Prisma,
     9	  QuestionType,
    10	  SystemRole,
    11	} from "@prisma/client";
    12	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
    13	import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache";
    14	import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
    15	import { z } from "zod";

    17	import {
    18	  clearSession,
    19	  createSession,
    20	  getSessionContext,
    21	  routeForRole,
    22	  verifyCredentials,
    23	  verifyGlobalRhCredentials,
    24	} from "@/lib/auth";
    25	import {
    26	  calculateScore,
    27	  canAutosave,
    28	  getDeadline,
    29	  getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType,
    30	  resolveFinalStatus,
    31	} from "@/lib/evaluation";
    32	import { cloneQuestionSet, decimalToNumber, ensureCurrentEvaluation, getEvaluationWithRelations } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
    33	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
    34	import { getDefaultOptions, QUESTION_BANK } from "@/lib/question-bank";
    35	import { checkRateLimit, clearAttempts, recordFailedAttempt } from "@/lib/rate-limit";
    36	import { storeDocumentInDrive } from "@/lib/storage";
    37	import { parseXmlEmployees } from "@/lib/xml";
    38	
    39	const loginSchema = z.object({
    40	  cpf: z.string().min(11),
    41	  password: z.string().min(11),
    42	  year: z.coerce.number().int(),
    43	});
    44	
    45	export async function loginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
    46	  const parsed = loginSchema.safeParse({
    47	    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    48	    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    49	    year: formData.get("year"),
    50	  });
    51	
    52	  if (!parsed.success) {
    53	    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
    54	  }
    55	
    56	  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);
    57	
    58	  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    59	    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);
    63	
    64	  if (!result.ok) {
    65	    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    66	    return { error: result.message };
    67	  }
    68	
    69	  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
    70	
    71	  if (result.effectiveRole === SystemRole.RH) {
    72	    await createSession(result.user.id, null);
    73	    redirect("/rh");
    74	  }
    75	
    76	  await createSession(result.user.id, result.cycle.id);
    77	  redirect(`/${parsed.data.year}/${routeForRole(result.effectiveRole)}`);
    78	}
    79	
    80	const globalLoginSchema = z.object({
    81	  cpf: z.string().min(11),
    82	  password: z.string().min(11),
    83	});
    84	
    85	export async function rhLoginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
    86	  const parsed = globalLoginSchema.safeParse({
    87	    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    88	    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    89	  });
    90	
    91	  if (!parsed.success) {
    92	    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
    93	  }
    94	
    95	  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);
    96	
    97	  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    98	    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);
   102	
   103	  if (!result.ok) {
   104	    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
   105	    return { error: result.message };
   106	  }
   107	
   108	  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
   109	  await createSession(result.user.id, null);
   110	  redirect("/rh");
   111	}
   112	
   113	export async function logoutAction(year?: number, redirectTo?: string) {
   114	  await clearSession();
   115	  redirect(redirectTo ?? `/${year}/login`);
   116	}
   117	
   118	const draftSchema = z.object({
   119	  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
   120	  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
   121	});
   122	
   123	export async function saveDraftAction(input: z.infer<typeof draftSchema>) {
   124	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   125	
   126	  if (!sessionContext) {
   127	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   128	  }
   129	
   130	  const parsed = draftSchema.safeParse(input);
   131	
   132	  if (!parsed.success) {
   133	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Carga de rascunho inválida." };
   134	  }
   135	
   136	  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);
   137	
   138	  if (!evaluation) {
   139	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
   140	  }
   141	
   142	  const deadline = getDeadline(evaluation.cycle.startDate, "self");
   143	
   144	  if (!canAutosave(evaluation.status, deadline)) {
   145	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Prazo encerrado para salvar rascunho." };
   146	  }
   147	
   148	  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
   149	    where: {
   150	      userId_cycleId: {
   151	        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
   152	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   153	      },
   154	    },
   155	  });
   156	
   157	  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   158	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Rascunho não autorizado." };
   159	  }
   160	
   161	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   162	    for (const [questionId, optionId] of Object.entries(parsed.data.answers)) {
   163	      await tx.evaluationAnswer.upsert({
   164	        where: {
   165	          evaluationId_questionId_phase: {
   166	            evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   167	            questionId,
   168	            phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
   169	          },
   170	        },
   171	        create: {
   172	          evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   173	          questionId,
   174	          selectedOptionId: optionId,
   175	          phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
   176	        },
   177	        update: {
   178	          selectedOptionId: optionId,
   179	        },
   180	      });
   181	    }
   182	
   183	    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
   184	      where: {
   185	        id: {
   186	          in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers),
   187	        },
   188	      },
   189	    });
   190	
   191	    const score = calculateScore(
   192	      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
   193	      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
   194	    );
   195	
   196	    await tx.evaluation.update({
   197	      where: { id: evaluation.id },
   198	      data: {
   199	        status: EvaluationStatus.DRAFT,
   200	        selfScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
   201	        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
   202	      },
   203	    });
   204	  });
   205	
   206	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
   207	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);
   208	
   209	  return { ok: true as const, message: "Alterações salvas automaticamente." };
   210	}
   211	
   212	const submitSchema = z.object({
   213	  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
   214	  phase: z.enum(["self", "manager"]),
   215	  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
   216	});
   217	
   218	export async function submitEvaluationAction(input: z.infer<typeof submitSchema>) {
   219	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   220	
   221	  if (!sessionContext) {
   222	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   223	  }
   224	
   225	  const parsed = submitSchema.safeParse(input);
   226	
   227	  if (!parsed.success) {
   228	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Submissão inválida." };
   229	  }
   230	
   231	  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);
   232	
   233	  if (!evaluation) {
   234	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
   235	  }
   236	
   237	  const phase = parsed.data.phase === "self" ? EvaluationPhase.SELF : EvaluationPhase.MANAGER;
   238	  const isSelf = phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF;
   239	
   240	  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
   241	    where: {
   242	      userId_cycleId: {
   243	        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
   244	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   245	      },
   246	    },
   247	  });
   248	
   249	  if (!actorUserCycle) {
   250	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   251	  }
   252	
   253	  if (isSelf && evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   254	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
   255	  }
   256	
   257	  if (!isSelf && evaluation.managerId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   258	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
   259	  }
   260	
   261	  const questionCount = await prisma.question.count({
   262	    where: {
   263	      cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   264	      type: getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
   265	    },
   266	  });
   267	
   268	  if (Object.keys(parsed.data.answers).length !== questionCount) {
   269	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Preencha todos os fatores obrigatórios." };
   270	  }
   271	
   272	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   273	    for (const [questionId, optionId] of Object.entries(parsed.data.answers)) {
   274	      await tx.evaluationAnswer.upsert({
   275	        where: {
   276	          evaluationId_questionId_phase: {
   277	            evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   278	            questionId,
   279	            phase,
   280	          },
   281	        },
   282	        create: {
   283	          evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   284	          questionId,
   285	          selectedOptionId: optionId,
   286	          phase,
   287	        },
   288	        update: {
   289	          selectedOptionId: optionId,
   290	        },
   291	      });
   292	    }
   293	
   294	    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
   295	      where: {
   296	        id: { in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers) },
   297	      },
   298	    });
   299	
   300	    const score = calculateScore(
   301	      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
   302	      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
   303	    );
   304	
   305	    const nextStatus = resolveFinalStatus(evaluation.status, parsed.data.phase);
   306	
   307	    await tx.evaluation.update({
   308	      where: { id: evaluation.id },
   309	      data: {
   310	        status: nextStatus,
   311	        selfScore: isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.selfScore,
   312	        managerScore: !isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.managerScore,
   313	        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(isSelf ? score : score),
   314	        autoSubmittedAt: isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.autoSubmittedAt,
   315	        managerSubmittedAt: !isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.managerSubmittedAt,
   316	      },
   317	    });
   318	  });
   319	
   320	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
   321	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);
   322	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/rh`);
   323	
   324	  return { ok: true as const, redirectTo: `/${evaluation.cycle.year}/${isSelf ? "servidor" : "chefia"}` };
   325	}
   326	
   327	export async function uploadDocumentsAction(formData: FormData) {
   328	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   329	
   330	  if (!sessionContext) {
   331	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   332	  }
   333	
   334	  const evaluationId = String(formData.get("evaluationId") ?? "");
   335	  const files = formData.getAll("files").filter((file): file is File => file instanceof File);
   336	
   337	  if (!evaluationId || files.length === 0) {
   338	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nenhum arquivo enviado." };
   339	  }
   340	
   341	  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId);
   342	
   343	  if (!evaluation) {
   344	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
   345	  }
   346	
   347	  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
   348	    where: {
   349	      userId_cycleId: {
   350	        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
   351	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   352	      },
   353	    },
   354	  });
   355	
   356	  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   357	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   358	  }
   359	
   360	  if ((evaluation.documents?.length ?? 0) + files.length > 10) {
   361	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Limite máximo de 10 comprovantes por servidor." };
   362	  }
   363	
   364	  const uploaded = [];
   365	
   366	  for (const file of files) {
   367	    if (file.type !== "application/pdf") {
   368	      return { ok: false as const, message: "Apenas arquivos PDF são permitidos." };
   369	    }
   370	
   371	    if (file.size > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
   372	      return { ok: false as const, message: "Cada PDF deve ter no máximo 10MB." };
   373	    }
   374	
   375	    const sanitizedFileName =
   376	      file.name
   377	        .replace(/(\.\.(\/|\\|$))+/g, "")
   378	        .replace(/[\\/]+/g, "")
   379	        .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]/g, "")
   380	        .replace(/\.{2,}/g, ".")
   381	        .replace(/^\.+/, "") || "documento.pdf";
   382	
   383	    const stored = await storeDocumentInDrive({
   384	      buffer: Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer()),
   385	      fileName: sanitizedFileName,
   386	      cycleYear: evaluation.cycle.year,
   387	      userFolder: `${evaluation.evaluated.user.name.replace(/\s+/g, "_")}_${evaluation.evaluated.user.registration.replace(/\s+/g, "")}`,
   388	    });
   389	
   390	    const document = await prisma.document.create({
   391	      data: {
   392	        evaluationId,
   393	        name: sanitizedFileName,
   394	        mimeType: file.type,
   395	        size: file.size,
   396	        storageKey: stored.storageKey,
   397	        url: stored.url,
   398	      },
   399	    });
   400	
   401	    uploaded.push({
   402	      id: document.id,
   403	      name: document.name,
   404	      url: document.url,
   405	      size: document.size,
   406	    });
   407	  }
   408	
   409	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
   410	  return { ok: true as const, documents: uploaded };
   411	}
   412	
   413	const cycleSchema = z.object({
   414	  year: z.coerce.number().int().min(2020).max(2100),
   415	});
   416	
   417	export async function createCycleAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
   418	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   419	
   420	  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   421	    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
   422	  }
   423	
   424	  const parsed = cycleSchema.safeParse({
   425	    year: formData.get("year"),
   426	  });
   427	
   428	  if (!parsed.success) {
   429	    return { error: "Ano do ciclo inválido." };
   430	  }
   431	
   432	  const existing = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { year: parsed.data.year } });
   433	
   434	  if (existing) {
   435	    return { error: "Já existe um ciclo para esse ano." };
   436	  }
   437	
   438	  const openCycle = await prisma.cycle.findFirst({
   439	    where: { status: CycleStatus.OPEN },
   440	    orderBy: { year: "desc" },
   441	  });
   442	
   443	  if (openCycle) {
   444	    return {
   445	      error: `Finalize o projeto ${openCycle.year} antes de criar um novo ciclo.`,
   446	    };
   447	  }
   448	
   449	  const latestCycle = await prisma.cycle.findFirst({
   450	    orderBy: { year: "desc" },
   451	  });
   452	
   453	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.create({
   454	    data: {
   455	      year: parsed.data.year,
   456	      name: `Ciclo ${parsed.data.year}`,
   457	      startDate: new Date(`${parsed.data.year}-04-01T00:00:00.000Z`),
   458	      endDate: new Date(`${parsed.data.year}-04-30T23:59:59.999Z`),
   459	      status: CycleStatus.OPEN,
   460	      active: true,
   461	    },
   462	  });
   463	
   464	  await prisma.cycle.updateMany({
   465	    where: { NOT: { id: cycle.id } },
   466	    data: { active: false },
   467	  });
   468	
   469	  if (latestCycle) {
   470	    await cloneQuestionSet(latestCycle.id, cycle.id);
   471	  } else {
   472	    for (const [type, questions] of Object.entries(QUESTION_BANK)) {
   473	      const questionType = type as QuestionType;
   474	      for (const [index, question] of questions.entries()) {
   475	        await prisma.question.create({
   476	          data: {
   477	            cycleId: cycle.id,
   478	            type: questionType,
   479	            title: question.title,
   480	            description: question.description,
   481	            sortOrder: index + 1,
   482	            options: {
   483	              create: getDefaultOptions(questionType).map((option, optionIndex) => ({
   484	                label: option.label,
   485	                score: option.score,
   486	                description: question.options[optionIndex],
   487	                sortOrder: optionIndex + 1,
   488	              })),
   489	            },
   490	          },
   491	        });
   492	      }
   493	    }
   494	  }
   495	
   496	  revalidatePath(`/${parsed.data.year}/rh`);
   497	  revalidatePath("/rh");
   498	  return { success: `Ciclo ${parsed.data.year} criado com sucesso.` };
   499	}
   500	
   501	export async function importXmlAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
   502	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   503	
   504	  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   505	    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
   506	  }
   507	
   508	  const cycleId = String(formData.get("cycleId") ?? "");
   509	  const xmlFile = formData.get("xml");
   510	
   511	  if (!cycleId || !(xmlFile instanceof File)) {
   512	    return { error: "Envie um arquivo XML válido." };
   513	  }
   514	
   515	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: cycleId } });
   516	
   517	  if (!cycle) {
   518	    return { error: "Ciclo não encontrado." };
   519	  }
   520	
   521	  const xml = await xmlFile.text();
   522	  const employees = parseXmlEmployees(xml);
   523	
   524	  if (employees.length === 0) {
   525	    return { error: "Nenhum registro reconhecido no XML." };
   526	  }
   527	
   528	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   529	    const managerMap = new Map();
   530	
   531	    for (const employee of employees) {
   532	      const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(employee.cpf, 10);
   533	      const user = await tx.user.upsert({
   534	        where: { cpf: employee.cpf },
   535	        create: {
   536	          cpf: employee.cpf,
   537	          name: employee.nome,
   538	          registration: employee.matricula,
   539	          passwordHash,
   540	        },
   541	        update: {
   542	          name: employee.nome,
   543	          registration: employee.matricula,
   544	        },
   545	      });
   546	
   547	      const isManager = employees.some((candidate) => candidate.chefiaCpf === employee.cpf);
   548	      const employmentType =
   549	        employee.vinculo.toUpperCase().includes("PROB") ? EmploymentType.PROBATORIO : EmploymentType.EFETIVO;
   550	
   551	      const userCycle = await tx.userCycle.upsert({
   552	        where: {
   553	          userId_cycleId: {
   554	            userId: user.id,
   555	            cycleId,
   556	          },
   557	        },
   558	        create: {
   559	          userId: user.id,
   560	          cycleId,
   561	          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
   562	          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
   563	          department: employee.secretaria,
   564	          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
   565	        },
   566	        update: {
   567	          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
   568	          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
   569	          department: employee.secretaria,
   570	          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
   571	        },
   572	      });
   573	
   574	      managerMap.set(employee.cpf, userCycle.id);
   575	    }
   576	
   577	    for (const employee of employees) {
   578	      if (!employee.chefiaCpf) {
   579	        continue;
   580	      }
   581	
   582	      const employeeUser = await tx.user.findUnique({ where: { cpf: employee.cpf } });
   583	      const employeeCycle = employeeUser
   584	        ? await tx.userCycle.findUnique({
   585	            where: {
   586	              userId_cycleId: {
   587	                userId: employeeUser.id,
   588	                cycleId,
   589	              },
   590	            },
   591	          })
   592	        : null;
   593	
   594	      if (!employeeCycle) {
   595	        continue;
   596	      }
   597	
   598	      await tx.userCycle.update({
   599	        where: { id: employeeCycle.id },
   600	        data: {
   601	          managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
   602	        },
   603	      });
   604	
   605	      const existingEvaluation = await tx.evaluation.findFirst({
   606	        where: {
   607	          cycleId,
   608	          evaluatedId: employeeCycle.id,
   609	          current: true,
   610	        },
   611	      });
   612	
   613	      if (existingEvaluation) {
   614	        await tx.evaluation.update({
   615	          where: { id: existingEvaluation.id },
   616	          data: {
   617	            managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
   618	          },
   619	        });
   620	      } else {
   621	        await tx.evaluation.create({
   622	          data: {
   623	            cycleId,
   624	            evaluatedId: employeeCycle.id,
   625	            managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
   626	            status: EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
   627	          },
   628	        });
   629	      }
   630	    }
   631	  });
   632	
   633	  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
   634	  revalidatePath("/rh");
   635	  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
   636	  return { success: `${employees.length} registro(s) importado(s) com sucesso.` };
   637	}
   638	
   639	export async function requestReevaluationAction(evaluationId: string) {
   640	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   641	
   642	  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   643	    return;
   644	  }
   645	
   646	  const evaluation = await prisma.evaluation.findUnique({
   647	    where: { id: evaluationId },
   648	    include: {
   649	      answers: true,
   650	      documents: true,
   651	    },
   652	  });
   653	
   654	  if (!evaluation) {
   655	    return;
   656	  }
   657	
   658	  const selfAnswers = evaluation.answers.filter((answer) => answer.phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF);
   659	  const hasSelfEvaluation =
   660	    selfAnswers.length > 0 ||
   661	    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE ||
   662	    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE ||
   663	    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED;
   664	
   665	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   666	    await tx.evaluation.update({
   667	      where: { id: evaluation.id },
   668	      data: {
   669	        current: false,
   670	        status: EvaluationStatus.ARCHIVED,
   671	        archivedAt: new Date(),
   672	      },
   673	    });
   674	
   675	    await tx.evaluation.create({
   676	      data: {
   677	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   678	        evaluatedId: evaluation.evaluatedId,
   679	        managerId: evaluation.managerId,
   680	        version: evaluation.version + 1,
   681	        current: true,
   682	        status: hasSelfEvaluation ? EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE : EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
   683	        selfScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
   684	        managerScore: new Prisma.Decimal(0),
   685	        finalScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
   686	        autoSubmittedAt: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.autoSubmittedAt ?? new Date() : null,
   687	        managerSubmittedAt: null,
   688	        reopenedAt: new Date(),
   689	        answers: {
   690	          create: selfAnswers.map((answer) => ({
   691	            questionId: answer.questionId,
   692	            selectedOptionId: answer.selectedOptionId,
   693	            phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
   694	          })),
   695	        },
   696	        documents: {
   697	          create: evaluation.documents.map((document) => ({
   698	            name: document.name,
   699	            mimeType: document.mimeType,
   700	            size: document.size,
   701	            storageKey: document.storageKey,
   702	            url: document.url,
   703	            status: document.status,
   704	          })),
   705	        },
   706	      },
   707	    });
   708	  });
   709	
   710	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: evaluation.cycleId } });
   711	
   712	  if (cycle) {
   713	    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
   714	    revalidatePath("/rh");
   715	    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
   716	    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/servidor`);
   717	  }
   718	}
   719	
   720	export async function completeCycleAction(cycleId: string) {
   721	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   722	
   723	  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   724	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   725	  }
   726	
   727	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({
   728	    where: { id: cycleId },
   729	  });
   730	
   731	  if (!cycle) {
   732	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Projeto não encontrado." };
   733	  }
   734	
   735	  const pendingCount = await prisma.evaluation.count({
   736	    where: {
   737	      cycleId,
   738	      current: true,
   739	      status: {
   740	        not: EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED,
   741	      },
   742	    },
   743	  });
   744	
   745	  if (pendingCount > 0) {
   746	    return {
   747	      ok: false as const,
   748	      message: "Ainda existem avaliações pendentes. Finalize o ciclo somente após concluir todo o fluxo.",
   749	    };
   750	  }
   751	
   752	  await prisma.cycle.update({
   753	    where: { id: cycleId },
   754	    data: {
   755	      status: CycleStatus.COMPLETED,
   756	      active: false,
   757	      completedAt: new Date(),
   758	    },
   759	  });
   760	
   761	  revalidatePath("/rh");
   762	  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
   763	
   764	  return { ok: true as const, message: `Projeto ${cycle.year} finalizado.` };
   765	}

     1	import { EmploymentType, EvaluationPhase, SystemRole } from "@prisma/client";
     2	import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
     3	
     4	import { AppShell } from "@/components/app-shell";
     5	import { EvaluationForm } from "@/components/evaluation-form";
     6	import { LogoutButton } from "@/components/logout-button";
     7	import { StatusBadge } from "@/components/status-badge";
     8	import { getSessionContext, requireSessionForYear } from "@/lib/auth";
     9	import { decimalToNumber, ensureCurrentEvaluation } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
    10	import { getClassification, getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType, isReadOnly, SCORE_BY_TYPE } from "@/lib/evaluation";
    11	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
    12	
    13	export default async function ServidorPage({
    14	  params,
    15	}: {
    16	  params: Promise<{ year: string }>;
    17	}) {
    18	  const { year } = await params;
    19	  const cycleYear = Number(year);
    20	  const context = await requireSessionForYear(cycleYear, SystemRole.EMPLOYEE);
    21	
    22	  if (!context.userCycle) {
    23	    notFound();
    24	  }
    25	
    26	  if (!context.cycle) {
    27	    notFound();
    28	  }
    29	
    30	  const cycle = context.cycle;
    31	
    32	  const evaluation = await ensureCurrentEvaluation({
    33	    cycleId: cycle.id,
    34	    evaluatedId: context.userCycle.id,
    35	    managerId: context.userCycle.managerId,
    36	  });
    37	
    38	  const fullEvaluation = await prisma.evaluation.findUniqueOrThrow({
    39	    where: { id: evaluation.id },
    40	    include: {
    41	      documents: true,
    42	      answers: {
    43	        where: { phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF },
    44	      },
    45	    },
    46	  });
    47	
    48	  const type = getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(context.userCycle.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO);
    49	  const questions = await prisma.question.findMany({
    50	    where: {
    51	      cycleId: cycle.id,
    52	      type,
    53	    },
    54	    include: {
    55	      options: {
    56	        orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" },
    57	      },
    58	    },
    59	    orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" },
    60	  });
    61	
    62	  const initialAnswers = Object.fromEntries(
    63	    fullEvaluation.answers.map((answer) => [answer.questionId, answer.selectedOptionId]),
    64	  );
    65	  const selfScore = decimalToNumber(fullEvaluation.selfScore);
    66	
    67	  const session = await getSessionContext();
    68	
    69	  return (
    70	    <AppShell
    71	      actions={<LogoutButton year={cycleYear} />}
    72	      currentPath={`/${cycleYear}/servidor`}
    73	      navItems={[{ href: `/${cycleYear}/servidor`, label: "Avaliação" }]}
    74	      subtitle="Portal do Servidor"
    75	      title="Nomos"
    76	      userMeta={`${context.userCycle.jobTitle} · ${context.userCycle.department}`}
    77	      userName={session?.user.name ?? context.user.name}
    78	    >
    79	      <div className="mb-6 flex items-center justify-between">
    80	        <div>
    81	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
    82	            Status do fluxo <StatusBadge status={fullEvaluation.status} />
    83	          </p>
    84	          {selfScore > 0 ? (
    85	            <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
    86	              Pontuacao: {selfScore.toFixed(2)} pts - {getClassification(selfScore, type)}
    87	            </p>
    88	          ) : null}
    89	        </div>
    90	      </div>
    91	
    92	      <EvaluationForm
    93	        actorName={context.user.name}
    94	        currentScore={selfScore}
    95	        employmentType={context.userCycle.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO}
    96	        evaluationId={fullEvaluation.id}
    97	        initialAnswers={initialAnswers}
    98	        initialDocuments={fullEvaluation.documents.map((document) => ({
    99	          id: document.id,
   100	          name: document.name,
   101	          size: document.size,
   102	          url: document.url,
   103	        }))}
   104	        maxScore={SCORE_BY_TYPE[type].cap}
   105	        phase="self"
   106	        questions={questions.map((question) => ({
   107	          id: question.id,
   108	          title: question.title,
   109	          description: question.description,
   110	          sortOrder: question.sortOrder,
   111	          options: question.options.map((option) => ({
   112	            id: option.id,
   113	            label: option.label,
   114	            description: option.description,
   115	            score: Number(option.score),
   116	          })),
   117	        }))}
   118	        readOnly={isReadOnly(fullEvaluation.status, "self")}
   119	        status={fullEvaluation.status}
   120	        year={cycleYear}
   121	      />
   122	    </AppShell>
   123	  );
   124	}
FILE app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx
     1	import Link from "next/link";
     2	import { SystemRole } from "@prisma/client";
     3	import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
     4	
     5	import { AppShell } from "@/components/app-shell";
     6	import { LogoutButton } from "@/components/logout-button";
     7	import { StatusBadge } from "@/components/status-badge";
     8	import { requireSessionForYear } from "@/lib/auth";
     9	import { ensureCurrentEvaluation } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
    10	import { decimalToNumber } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
    11	import { canManagerEvaluate, getDeadline, getRemainingDays } from "@/lib/evaluation";
    12	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
    13	
    14	export default async function ChefiaPage({
    15	  params,
    16	}: {
    17	  params: Promise<{ year: string }>;
    18	}) {
    19	  const { year } = await params;
    20	  const cycleYear = Number(year);
    21	  const context = await requireSessionForYear(cycleYear, SystemRole.MANAGER);
    22	
    23	  if (!context.userCycle) {
    24	    notFound();
    25	  }
    26	
    27	  if (!context.cycle) {
    28	    notFound();
    29	  }
    30	
    31	  const managerUserCycle = context.userCycle;
    32	  const cycle = context.cycle;
    33	
    34	  const subordinates = await prisma.userCycle.findMany({
    35	    where: {
    36	      managerId: managerUserCycle.id,
    37	      cycleId: cycle.id,
    38	      role: SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
    39	    },
    40	    include: {
    41	      user: true,
    42	      evaluations: {
    43	        where: { current: true },
    44	      },
    45	    },
    46	    orderBy: { user: { name: "asc" } },
    47	  });
    48	
    49	  const hydratedSubordinates = await Promise.all(
    50	    subordinates.map(async (item) => {
    51	      const evaluation =
    52	        item.evaluations[0] ??
    53	        (await ensureCurrentEvaluation({
    54	          cycleId: cycle.id,
    55	          evaluatedId: item.id,
    56	          managerId: managerUserCycle.id,
    57	        }));
    58	
    59	      return {
    60	        ...item,
    61	        evaluations: [evaluation],
    62	      };
    63	    }),
    64	  );
    65	
    66	  const total = hydratedSubordinates.length;
    67	  const completed = hydratedSubordinates.filter((item) => item.evaluations[0]?.status === "COMPLETED").length;
    68	  const pending = total - completed;
    69	
    70	  return (
    71	    <AppShell
    72	      actions={<LogoutButton year={cycleYear} />}
    73	      currentPath={`/${cycleYear}/chefia`}
    74	      navItems={[{ href: `/${cycleYear}/chefia`, label: "Painel de Avaliação" }]}
    75	      subtitle="Chefia Imediata"
    76	      title="Nomos"
    77	      userMeta={`${managerUserCycle.jobTitle} · ${managerUserCycle.department}`}
    78	      userName={context.user.name}
    79	    >
    80	      <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-3">
    81	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
    82	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Total de subordinados</p>
    83	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary">{total}</p>
    84	        </div>
    85	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
    86	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Avaliações pendentes</p>
    87	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-error">{pending}</p>
    88	        </div>
    89	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
    90	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Concluídas</p>
    91	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary-container">{completed}</p>
    92	        </div>
    93	      </div>
    94	
    95	      <section className="institutional-card mt-8 overflow-hidden">
    96	        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
    97	          <table className="w-full min-w-[860px] text-left">
    98	            <thead className="bg-surface-container-low text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-on-surface-variant">
    99	              <tr>
   100	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Servidor</th>
   101	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Vínculo</th>
   102	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Status</th>
   103	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Prazo chefia</th>
   104	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Autoavaliação</th>
   105	                <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Ações</th>
   106	              </tr>
   107	            </thead>
   108	            <tbody>
   109	              {hydratedSubordinates.map((item) => {
   110	                const evaluation = item.evaluations[0];
   111	                const status = evaluation?.status ?? "PENDING";
   112	                const selfScore = decimalToNumber(evaluation?.selfScore);
   113	                const deadline = getDeadline(cycle.startDate, "manager");
   114	                const canEvaluate = canManagerEvaluate(status);
   115	
   116	                return (
   117	                  <tr className="border-t border-transparent hover:bg-surface-container-low/30" key={item.id}>
   118	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
   119	                      <p className="font-bold text-on-surface">{item.user.name}</p>
   120	                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-on-surface-variant">Mat. {item.user.registration}</p>
   121	                    </td>
   122	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
   123	                      <span className="rounded-full bg-surface-container px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold text-on-secondary-container">
   124	                        {item.employmentType}
   125	                      </span>
   126	                    </td>
   127	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
   128	                      <StatusBadge status={status} />
   129	                    </td>
   130	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
   131	                      {getRemainingDays(deadline)} dias restantes
   132	                    </td>
   133	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
   134	                      {selfScore > 0 ? `${selfScore.toFixed(2)} pts` : "Aguardando envio"}
   135	                    </td>
   136	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-right">
   137	                      {canEvaluate ? (
   138	                        <Link
   139	                          className="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-institutional-gradient px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-on-primary"
   140	                          href={`/${cycleYear}/chefia/avaliacoes/${evaluation?.id}`}
   141	                        >
   142	                          Avaliar agora
   143	                        </Link>
   144	                      ) : (
   145	                        <div className="inline-flex flex-col items-end gap-1">
   146	                          <span className="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-surface-container px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-on-surface-variant">
   147	                            Bloqueado
   148	                          </span>
   149	                          <span className="text-[11px] text-on-surface-variant">
   150	                            Aguardando autoavaliação
   151	                          </span>
   152	                        </div>
   153	                      )}
   154	                    </td>
   155	                  </tr>
   156	                );
   157	              })}
   158	            </tbody>
   159	          </table>
   160	        </div>
   161	      </section>
   162	    </AppShell>
   163	  );
   164	}

     7	export default async function LoginPage({
     8	  params,

    10	  params: Promise<{ year: string }>;

    17	  if (session?.effectiveRole === "RH") {
    18	    redirect("/rh");
    19	  }

    22	    redirect(`/${cycleYear}/${session.effectiveRole === "MANAGER" ? "chefia" : "servidor"}`);
    23	  }
    24	
    25	  return (
    26	    <main className="relative flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-surface px-6 py-12">
    27	      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(0,29,68,0.08),transparent_35%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_left,rgba(0,50,107,0.08),transparent_30%)]" />
    28	      <div className="relative z-10 w-full max-w-md">
    29	        <div className="mb-10 text-center">
    30	          <div className="mx-auto mb-6 flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-surface-container-low text-3xl text-primary">
    31	            N
    32	          </div>
    33	          <h1 className="font-headline text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-primary">Portal Institucional</h1>
    34	          <p className="mt-3 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
    35	            Ciclo {cycle?.year} · CPF como login e senha inicial.
    36	          </p>
    37	        </div>
    38	
    39	        <div className="institutional-card border border-outline-variant/10 p-8">
    40	          <LoginForm year={cycleYear} />
    41	        </div>
    42	
    43	        <p className="mt-8 text-center text-xs font-medium tracking-[0.18em] text-on-surface-variant/70">
    44	          NOMOS · GOVERNO DIGITAL · CICLO ANUAL DE AVALIAÇÃO
    45	        </p>
    46	      </div>
    47	    </main>
    48	  );
    49	}
