     1	import { SystemRole } from "@prisma/client";
     2	import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
     3	import Link from "next/link";
     4	
     5	import { AppShell } from "@/components/app-shell";
     6	import { LogoutButton } from "@/components/logout-button";
     7	import { ReevaluationButton } from "@/components/reevaluation-button";
     8	import { XmlImportForm } from "@/components/rh-forms";
     9	import { StatusBadge } from "@/components/status-badge";
    10	import { requireGlobalRhSession } from "@/lib/auth";
    11	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
    12	
    13	export default async function RhPage({
    14	  params,
    15	}: {
    16	  params: Promise<{ year: string }>;
    17	}) {
    18	  const { year } = await params;
    19	  const cycleYear = Number(year);
    20	  const context = await requireGlobalRhSession();
    21	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({
    22	    where: { year: cycleYear },
    23	  });
    24	
    25	  if (!cycle) {
    26	    notFound();
    27	  }
    28	
    29	  const [cycles, employees, evaluations] = await Promise.all([
    30	    prisma.cycle.findMany({
    31	      orderBy: { year: "desc" },
    32	    }),
    33	    prisma.userCycle.findMany({
    34	      where: {
    35	        cycleId: cycle.id,
    36	        role: SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
    37	      },
    38	      include: {
    39	        user: true,
    40	        evaluations: {
    41	          where: { current: true },
    42	        },
    43	      },
    44	      orderBy: [{ department: "asc" }, { user: { name: "asc" } }],
    45	    }),
    46	    prisma.evaluation.count({
    47	      where: {
    48	        cycleId: cycle.id,
    49	        current: true,
    50	        status: "COMPLETED",
    51	      },
    52	    }),
    53	  ]);
    54	
    55	  return (
    56	    <AppShell
    57	      actions={<LogoutButton redirectTo="/rh/login" />}
    58	      currentPath={`/${cycleYear}/rh`}
    59	      navItems={[
    60	        { href: "/rh", label: "Projetos" },
    61	        { href: `/${cycleYear}/rh`, label: `Projeto ${cycleYear}` },
    62	      ]}
    63	      subtitle={`Projeto ${cycleYear}`}
    64	      title="Nomos"
    65	      userMeta="Administrador global de RH"
    66	      userName={context.user.name}
    67	    >
    68	      <section className="mb-8 flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-end lg:justify-between">
    69	        <div>
    70	          <p className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-primary">Gestão de ciclos</p>
    71	          <h1 className="mt-2 font-headline text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-primary">Ciclo de Avaliação Institucional</h1>
    72	        </div>
    73	        <div className="headline-gradient rounded-xl px-6 py-4 text-white">
    74	          <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-white/70">Link dinâmico</p>
    75	          <p className="mt-2 font-mono text-sm">{`/`}{cycleYear}/login</p>
    76	        </div>
    77	      </section>
    78	
    79	      <div className="grid gap-8 lg:grid-cols-[320px_1fr]">
    80	        <div className="institutional-card p-8">
    81	          <h2 className="font-headline text-xl font-bold text-primary">Definição do ciclo</h2>
    82	          <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
    83	            A criação de novos projetos ocorre no hub global do RH e só é liberada após a finalização do ciclo aberto.
    84	          </p>
    85	          <div className="mt-6">
    86	            <Link
    87	              className="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-institutional-gradient px-5 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-on-primary"
    88	              href="/rh"
    89	            >
    90	              Voltar ao hub global
    91	            </Link>
    92	          </div>
    93	        </div>
    94	
    95	        <div className="institutional-card p-8">
    96	          <h2 className="font-headline text-xl font-bold text-primary">Importação de base XML</h2>
    97	          <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">A importação faz upsert de usuários, retrata o organograma do ano e gera avaliações pendentes automaticamente.</p>
    98	          <div className="mt-6">
    99	            <XmlImportForm cycleId={cycle.id} />
   100	          </div>
   101	        </div>
   102	      </div>
   103	
   104	      <div className="mt-8 grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-3">
   105	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
   106	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Total de servidores</p>
   107	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary">{employees.length}</p>
   108	        </div>
   109	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
   110	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Concluídos</p>
   111	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary-container">{evaluations}</p>
   112	        </div>
   113	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
   114	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Pendentes</p>
   115	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-error">{employees.length - evaluations}</p>
   116	        </div>
   117	      </div>
   118	
   119	      <section className="institutional-card mt-8 overflow-hidden">
   120	        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   121	          <table className="w-full min-w-[980px] text-left">
   122	            <thead className="bg-surface-container-low text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-on-surface-variant">
   123	              <tr>
   124	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Servidor</th>
   125	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Secretaria</th>
   126	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Cargo</th>
   127	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Status</th>
   128	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Versão</th>
   129	                <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Ações</th>
   130	              </tr>
   131	            </thead>
   132	            <tbody>
   133	              {employees.map((employee) => {
   134	                const evaluation = employee.evaluations[0];
   135	                return (
   136	                  <tr className="hover:bg-surface-container-low/30" key={employee.id}>
   137	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
   138	                      <p className="font-bold text-on-surface">{employee.user.name}</p>
   139	                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-on-surface-variant">Mat. {employee.user.registration}</p>
   140	                    </td>
   141	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">{employee.department}</td>
   142	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">{employee.jobTitle}</td>
   143	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">{evaluation ? <StatusBadge status={evaluation.status} /> : "Sem avaliação"}</td>
   144	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">v{evaluation?.version ?? 1}</td>
   145	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-right">
   146	                      {evaluation ? <ReevaluationButton evaluationId={evaluation.id} /> : null}
   147	                    </td>
   148	                  </tr>
   149	                );
   150	              })}
   151	            </tbody>
   152	          </table>
   153	        </div>
   154	      </section>
   155	    </AppShell>
   156	  );
   157	}
FILE app/[year]/chefia/avaliacoes/[evaluationId]/page.tsx
     1	import { EmploymentType, EvaluationPhase, SystemRole } from "@prisma/client";
     2	import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
     3	
     4	import { AppShell } from "@/components/app-shell";
     5	import { EvaluationForm } from "@/components/evaluation-form";
     6	import { LogoutButton } from "@/components/logout-button";
     7	import { requireSessionForYear } from "@/lib/auth";
     8	import { decimalToNumber, getEvaluationWithRelations } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
     9	import { canManagerEvaluate, getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType, isReadOnly, SCORE_BY_TYPE } from "@/lib/evaluation";
    10	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
    11	
    12	export default async function ManagerEvaluationPage({
    13	  params,
    14	}: {
    15	  params: Promise<{ year: string; evaluationId: string }>;
    16	}) {
    17	  const { year, evaluationId } = await params;
    18	  const cycleYear = Number(year);
    19	  const context = await requireSessionForYear(cycleYear, SystemRole.MANAGER);
    20	
    21	  if (!context.userCycle) {
    22	    notFound();
    23	  }
    24	
    25	  if (!context.cycle) {
    26	    notFound();
    27	  }
    28	
    29	  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId);
    30	
    31	  if (
    32	    !evaluation ||
    33	    evaluation.managerId !== context.userCycle.id ||
    34	    !canManagerEvaluate(evaluation.status)
    35	  ) {
    36	    notFound();
    37	  }
    38	
    39	  const type = getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO);
    40	  const questions = await prisma.question.findMany({
    41	    where: {
    42	      cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
    43	      type,
    44	    },
    45	    include: {
    46	      options: {
    47	        orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" },
    48	      },
    49	    },
    50	    orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" },
    51	  });
    52	
    53	  const initialAnswers = Object.fromEntries(
    54	    evaluation.answers
    55	      .filter((answer) => answer.phase === EvaluationPhase.MANAGER)
    56	      .map((answer) => [answer.questionId, answer.selectedOptionId]),
    57	  );
    58	
    59	  return (
    60	    <AppShell
    61	      actions={<LogoutButton year={cycleYear} />}
    62	      currentPath={`/${cycleYear}/chefia`}
    63	      navItems={[{ href: `/${cycleYear}/chefia`, label: "Painel de Avaliação" }]}
    64	      subtitle="Parecer da Chefia"
    65	      title="Nomos"
    66	      userMeta={`${context.userCycle.jobTitle} · ${context.userCycle.department}`}
    67	      userName={context.user.name}
    68	    >
    69	      <EvaluationForm
    70	        actorName={evaluation.evaluated.user.name}
    71	        currentScore={decimalToNumber(evaluation.managerScore)}
    72	        employmentType={evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO}
    73	        evaluationId={evaluation.id}
    74	        initialAnswers={initialAnswers}
    75	        initialDocuments={evaluation.documents.map((document) => ({
    76	          id: document.id,
    77	          name: document.name,
    78	          size: document.size,
    79	          url: document.url,
    80	        }))}
    81	        maxScore={SCORE_BY_TYPE[type].cap}
    82	        phase="manager"
    83	        questions={questions.map((question) => ({
    84	          id: question.id,
    85	          title: question.title,
    86	          description: question.description,
    87	          sortOrder: question.sortOrder,
    88	          options: question.options.map((option) => ({
    89	            id: option.id,
    90	            label: option.label,
    91	            description: option.description,
    92	            score: Number(option.score),
    93	          })),
    94	        }))}
    95	        readOnly={isReadOnly(evaluation.status, "manager")}
    96	        status={evaluation.status}
    97	        year={cycleYear}
    98	      />
    99	    </AppShell>
   100	  );
   101	}

codex
1. `getEvaluationWithRelations` carrega um grafo muito maior que o necessário e é reutilizado em `saveDraftAction`, `submitEvaluationAction`, `uploadDocumentsAction` e na página da chefia, trazendo `documents`, `evaluated.manager.user`, `manager.user`, `answers.question.options` e `selectedOption` sem uso nesses fluxos; impacto `ALTO`; [lib/evaluations-data.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/evaluations-data.ts:33); correcao: dividir em queries específicas com `select` mínimo por caso de uso em vez de um `include` genérico.

2. `cloneQuestionSet` faz `question.create` dentro de loop, gerando uma query de escrita por pergunta após um `findMany`; impacto `MEDIO`; [lib/evaluations-data.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/evaluations-data.ts:72); correcao: montar um lote com `createMany` para perguntas e opções, ou pelo menos agrupar por etapas fora de loop de round-trip por item.

3. `saveDraftAction` faz `evaluationAnswer.upsert` dentro de loop, produzindo N queries por submissão de rascunho; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:161); correcao: substituir por estratégia em lote como `deleteMany` + `createMany` ou dif incremental pré-calculado para reduzir round-trips.

4. `saveDraftAction` busca opções com `findMany` sem `select`, embora só use `label`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:183); correcao: usar `select: { label: true }`.

5. `submitEvaluationAction` repete o padrão N+1 com `evaluationAnswer.upsert` em loop para cada resposta; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:272); correcao: gravar respostas em lote em vez de uma query por questão.

6. `submitEvaluationAction` também carrega opções sem `select` e só consome `label`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:294); correcao: usar `select: { label: true }`.

7. A inicialização de perguntas do primeiro ciclo faz `question.create` em loop aninhado, uma query por pergunta; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:472); correcao: persistir o questionário inicial em lote com `createMany` e inserção separada das opções.

8. `importXmlAction` abre uma transação muito grande que engloba todo o XML, hashing bcrypt e múltiplos upserts/updates por funcionário, aumentando tempo de lock e contenção; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:528); correcao: mover `bcrypt.hash` e pré-processamento para fora da transação e quebrar a importação em etapas/lotes menores.

9. No primeiro loop de `importXmlAction`, `employees.some(...)` roda para cada funcionário, adicionando custo O(n²) dentro da transação; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:547); correcao: pré-computar um `Set` de CPFs de chefia antes da transação.

10. No segundo loop de `importXmlAction`, cada iteração faz `user.findUnique`, `userCycle.findUnique` e `evaluation.findFirst`, caracterizando N+1 explícito; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:577); correcao: carregar usuários/ciclos/avaliações correntes do ciclo em memória uma vez e resolver os vínculos pelo mapa local.

11. `requestReevaluationAction` busca `answers` e `documents` completos sem `select`, mas só usa alguns campos para clonar; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:646); correcao: limitar a query aos campos realmente copiados (`questionId`, `selectedOptionId`, `name`, `mimeType`, `size`, `storageKey`, `url`, `status` e metadados da avaliação).

12. `ServidorPage` lê `documents` e `answers` sem `select`, apesar de só usar `documents.id/name/size/url` e `answers.questionId/selectedOptionId`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx:38); correcao: trocar `include` por `select` enxuto nas relações.

13. `ServidorPage` busca `question` com `include: { options: true }` sem `select`, retornando todas as colunas de pergunta e opção; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx:49); correcao: selecionar apenas `id`, `title`, `description`, `sortOrder` e, em `options`, `id`, `label`, `description`, `score`.

14. `ChefiaPage` sofre N+1 porque, após carregar subordinados, chama `ensureCurrentEvaluation` para cada item sem avaliação corrente; impacto `ALTO`; [app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx:49); correcao: garantir/criar avaliações correntes em lote antes de renderizar e depois fazer uma única leitura consolidada.

15. `ChefiaPage` traz `user` e `evaluations` completos, mas usa só `user.name`, `user.registration`, `evaluation.id`, `status` e `selfScore`; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx:34); correcao: aplicar `select` nas duas relações.

16. `RhPage` executa `prisma.cycle.findMany` e nunca usa o resultado, desperdiçando uma query inteira; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/rh/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/rh/page.tsx:29); correcao: remover a query `cycles` do `Promise.all`.

17. `RhPage` carrega `userCycle.user` e `evaluations` completos, embora a tabela use só `user.name`, `user.registration`, `evaluation.id`, `status` e `version`; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/[year]/rh/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/rh/page.tsx:33); correcao: trocar `include` por `select` específico nas relações.

18. Faltam índices compostos para `Evaluation(cycleId, evaluatedId, current)` e `Evaluation(cycleId, current, status)`, usados em `findFirst`/`count` de avaliação corrente e pendências; impacto `ALTO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:145); correcao: adicionar `@@index([cycleId, evaluatedId, current])` e `@@index([cycleId, current, status])`.

19. Falta índice para `UserCycle(cycleId, managerId, role)`, usado para listar subordinados por ciclo e chefia; impacto `ALTO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:101); correcao: adicionar `@@index([cycleId, managerId, role])`.

20. Faltam índices para `Question(cycleId, type, sortOrder)` e `Option(questionId, sortOrder)`, usados em filtros e ordenações das telas de avaliação; impacto `MEDIO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:122); correcao: adicionar `@@index([cycleId, type, sortOrder])` em `Question` e `@@index([questionId, sortOrder])` em `Option`.

21. Falta índice para `Document(evaluationId, createdAt)`, usado quando documentos são carregados por avaliação ordenados por data; impacto `MEDIO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:184); correcao: adicionar `@@index([evaluationId, createdAt])`.

22. As queries simples de existência de ciclo retornam a linha inteira sem `select`, embora só precisem validar presença ou ler `year`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/layout.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/layout.tsx:13) e [app/[year]/login/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/login/page.tsx:14); correcao: usar `select: { id: true }` ou `select: { year: true }` conforme o caso.
tokens used
41,227
1. `getEvaluationWithRelations` carrega um grafo muito maior que o necessário e é reutilizado em `saveDraftAction`, `submitEvaluationAction`, `uploadDocumentsAction` e na página da chefia, trazendo `documents`, `evaluated.manager.user`, `manager.user`, `answers.question.options` e `selectedOption` sem uso nesses fluxos; impacto `ALTO`; [lib/evaluations-data.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/evaluations-data.ts:33); correcao: dividir em queries específicas com `select` mínimo por caso de uso em vez de um `include` genérico.

2. `cloneQuestionSet` faz `question.create` dentro de loop, gerando uma query de escrita por pergunta após um `findMany`; impacto `MEDIO`; [lib/evaluations-data.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/evaluations-data.ts:72); correcao: montar um lote com `createMany` para perguntas e opções, ou pelo menos agrupar por etapas fora de loop de round-trip por item.

3. `saveDraftAction` faz `evaluationAnswer.upsert` dentro de loop, produzindo N queries por submissão de rascunho; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:161); correcao: substituir por estratégia em lote como `deleteMany` + `createMany` ou dif incremental pré-calculado para reduzir round-trips.

4. `saveDraftAction` busca opções com `findMany` sem `select`, embora só use `label`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:183); correcao: usar `select: { label: true }`.

5. `submitEvaluationAction` repete o padrão N+1 com `evaluationAnswer.upsert` em loop para cada resposta; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:272); correcao: gravar respostas em lote em vez de uma query por questão.

6. `submitEvaluationAction` também carrega opções sem `select` e só consome `label`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:294); correcao: usar `select: { label: true }`.

7. A inicialização de perguntas do primeiro ciclo faz `question.create` em loop aninhado, uma query por pergunta; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:472); correcao: persistir o questionário inicial em lote com `createMany` e inserção separada das opções.

8. `importXmlAction` abre uma transação muito grande que engloba todo o XML, hashing bcrypt e múltiplos upserts/updates por funcionário, aumentando tempo de lock e contenção; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:528); correcao: mover `bcrypt.hash` e pré-processamento para fora da transação e quebrar a importação em etapas/lotes menores.

9. No primeiro loop de `importXmlAction`, `employees.some(...)` roda para cada funcionário, adicionando custo O(n²) dentro da transação; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:547); correcao: pré-computar um `Set` de CPFs de chefia antes da transação.

10. No segundo loop de `importXmlAction`, cada iteração faz `user.findUnique`, `userCycle.findUnique` e `evaluation.findFirst`, caracterizando N+1 explícito; impacto `ALTO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:577); correcao: carregar usuários/ciclos/avaliações correntes do ciclo em memória uma vez e resolver os vínculos pelo mapa local.

11. `requestReevaluationAction` busca `answers` e `documents` completos sem `select`, mas só usa alguns campos para clonar; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:646); correcao: limitar a query aos campos realmente copiados (`questionId`, `selectedOptionId`, `name`, `mimeType`, `size`, `storageKey`, `url`, `status` e metadados da avaliação).

12. `ServidorPage` lê `documents` e `answers` sem `select`, apesar de só usar `documents.id/name/size/url` e `answers.questionId/selectedOptionId`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx:38); correcao: trocar `include` por `select` enxuto nas relações.

13. `ServidorPage` busca `question` com `include: { options: true }` sem `select`, retornando todas as colunas de pergunta e opção; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/servidor/page.tsx:49); correcao: selecionar apenas `id`, `title`, `description`, `sortOrder` e, em `options`, `id`, `label`, `description`, `score`.

14. `ChefiaPage` sofre N+1 porque, após carregar subordinados, chama `ensureCurrentEvaluation` para cada item sem avaliação corrente; impacto `ALTO`; [app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx:49); correcao: garantir/criar avaliações correntes em lote antes de renderizar e depois fazer uma única leitura consolidada.

15. `ChefiaPage` traz `user` e `evaluations` completos, mas usa só `user.name`, `user.registration`, `evaluation.id`, `status` e `selfScore`; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx:34); correcao: aplicar `select` nas duas relações.

16. `RhPage` executa `prisma.cycle.findMany` e nunca usa o resultado, desperdiçando uma query inteira; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/rh/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/rh/page.tsx:29); correcao: remover a query `cycles` do `Promise.all`.

17. `RhPage` carrega `userCycle.user` e `evaluations` completos, embora a tabela use só `user.name`, `user.registration`, `evaluation.id`, `status` e `version`; impacto `MEDIO`; [app/[year]/rh/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/rh/page.tsx:33); correcao: trocar `include` por `select` específico nas relações.

18. Faltam índices compostos para `Evaluation(cycleId, evaluatedId, current)` e `Evaluation(cycleId, current, status)`, usados em `findFirst`/`count` de avaliação corrente e pendências; impacto `ALTO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:145); correcao: adicionar `@@index([cycleId, evaluatedId, current])` e `@@index([cycleId, current, status])`.

19. Falta índice para `UserCycle(cycleId, managerId, role)`, usado para listar subordinados por ciclo e chefia; impacto `ALTO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:101); correcao: adicionar `@@index([cycleId, managerId, role])`.

20. Faltam índices para `Question(cycleId, type, sortOrder)` e `Option(questionId, sortOrder)`, usados em filtros e ordenações das telas de avaliação; impacto `MEDIO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:122); correcao: adicionar `@@index([cycleId, type, sortOrder])` em `Question` e `@@index([questionId, sortOrder])` em `Option`.

21. Falta índice para `Document(evaluationId, createdAt)`, usado quando documentos são carregados por avaliação ordenados por data; impacto `MEDIO`; [prisma/schema.prisma](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/prisma/schema.prisma:184); correcao: adicionar `@@index([evaluationId, createdAt])`.

22. As queries simples de existência de ciclo retornam a linha inteira sem `select`, embora só precisem validar presença ou ler `year`; impacto `BAIXO`; [app/[year]/layout.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/layout.tsx:13) e [app/[year]/login/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/login/page.tsx:14); correcao: usar `select: { id: true }` ou `select: { year: true }` conforme o caso.

 succeeded in 0ms:
model UserCycle {
  id             String         @id @default(cuid())
  userId         String
  cycleId        String
  role           SystemRole
  employmentType EmploymentType?
  department     String
  jobTitle       String
  managerId      String?
  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt
  user           User           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  cycle          Cycle          @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  manager        UserCycle?     @relation("Management", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  subordinates   UserCycle[]    @relation("Management")
  evaluations    Evaluation[]   @relation("EvaluatedUser")
  managerReviews Evaluation[]   @relation("ManagerUser")

  @@unique([userId, cycleId])
}

model Question {
  id          String       @id @default(cuid())
  cycleId      String
  type        QuestionType
  title       String
  description String
  sortOrder   Int
  cycle       Cycle        @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  options     Option[]
  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]
}

model Option {
  id          String             @id @default(cuid())
  questionId  String
  label       String
  description String
  score       Decimal
  sortOrder   Int
  question    Question           @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]
}

model Evaluation {
  id                String             @id @default(cuid())
  cycleId           String
  evaluatedId       String
  managerId         String?
  status            EvaluationStatus   @default(PENDING)
  selfScore         Decimal?           @default(0)
  managerScore      Decimal?           @default(0)
  finalScore        Decimal?           @default(0)
  version           Int                @default(1)
  current           Boolean            @default(true)
  autoSubmittedAt   DateTime?
  managerSubmittedAt DateTime?
  archivedAt        DateTime?
  reopenedAt        DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime           @updatedAt
  cycle             Cycle              @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  evaluated         UserCycle          @relation("EvaluatedUser", fields: [evaluatedId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  manager           UserCycle?         @relation("ManagerUser", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  answers           EvaluationAnswer[]
  documents         Document[]
}

model EvaluationAnswer {
  id               String          @id @default(cuid())
  evaluationId     String
  questionId       String
  selectedOptionId String
  phase            EvaluationPhase
  createdAt        DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime        @updatedAt
  evaluation       Evaluation      @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  question         Question        @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  selectedOption   Option          @relation(fields: [selectedOptionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([evaluationId, questionId, phase])
}

model Document {
  id           String         @id @default(cuid())
  evaluationId String
  name         String
  mimeType     String
  size         Int
  storageKey   String
  url          String
  status       DocumentStatus @default(UPLOADED)
  createdAt    DateTime       @default(now())
  evaluation   Evaluation     @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

 succeeded in 0ms:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum SystemRole {
  RH
  MANAGER
  EMPLOYEE
}

enum EmploymentType {
  EFETIVO
  PROBATORIO
}

enum EvaluationPhase {
  SELF
  MANAGER
}

enum QuestionType {
  BASE_60
  BASE_50
}

enum EvaluationStatus {
  PENDING
  DRAFT
  AUTO_DONE
  MANAGER_DONE
  COMPLETED
  ARCHIVED
}

enum DocumentStatus {
  PENDING
  UPLOADED
  FAILED
}

enum CycleStatus {
  OPEN
  COMPLETED
}

model User {
  id           String      @id @default(cuid())
  cpf          String      @unique
  name         String
  registration String      @unique
  passwordHash String
  globalRole   SystemRole?
  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt
  userCycles   UserCycle[]
  sessions     Session[]
}

model Cycle {
  id          String       @id @default(cuid())
  year        Int          @unique
  name        String
  startDate   DateTime
  endDate     DateTime
  status      CycleStatus  @default(OPEN)
  active      Boolean      @default(false)
  completedAt DateTime?
  createdAt   DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime     @updatedAt
  userCycles  UserCycle[]
  questions   Question[]
  evaluations Evaluation[]
  sessions    Session[]
}

model Session {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  token     String   @unique
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  userId    String
  cycleId   String?
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model LoginAttempt {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  cpf       String
  ip        String   @default("unknown")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
}

diff --git a/prisma/schema.prisma b/prisma/schema.prisma
index ab345194dcb4b5d80e71ebce71824290b5767ff3..f09e1e820983eadb4efc9eb7b3330d0ed6e9b514
--- a/prisma/schema.prisma
+++ b/prisma/schema.prisma
@@ -117,6 +117,7 @@
   managerReviews Evaluation[]   @relation("ManagerUser")
 
   @@unique([userId, cycleId])
+  @@index([cycleId, managerId, role])
 }
 
 model Question {
@@ -129,6 +130,8 @@
   cycle       Cycle        @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   options     Option[]
   answers     EvaluationAnswer[]
+
+  @@index([cycleId, type, sortOrder])
 }
 
 model Option {
@@ -140,6 +143,8 @@
   sortOrder   Int
   question    Question           @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
   answers     EvaluationAnswer[]
+
+  @@index([questionId, sortOrder])
 }
 
 model Evaluation {
@@ -164,6 +169,9 @@
   manager           UserCycle?         @relation("ManagerUser", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
   answers           EvaluationAnswer[]
   documents         Document[]
+
+  @@index([cycleId, evaluatedId, current])
+  @@index([cycleId, current, status])
 }
 
 model EvaluationAnswer {
@@ -192,4 +200,6 @@
   status       DocumentStatus @default(UPLOADED)
   createdAt    DateTime       @default(now())
   evaluation   Evaluation     @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  @@index([evaluationId, createdAt])
 }

 succeeded in 0ms:
model UserCycle {
  id             String         @id @default(cuid())
  userId         String
  cycleId        String
  role           SystemRole
  employmentType EmploymentType?
  department     String
  jobTitle       String
  managerId      String?
  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt
  user           User           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  cycle          Cycle          @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  manager        UserCycle?     @relation("Management", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  subordinates   UserCycle[]    @relation("Management")
  evaluations    Evaluation[]   @relation("EvaluatedUser")
  managerReviews Evaluation[]   @relation("ManagerUser")

  @@unique([userId, cycleId])
  @@index([cycleId, managerId, role])
}

model Question {
  id          String       @id @default(cuid())
  cycleId      String
  type        QuestionType
  title       String
  description String
  sortOrder   Int
  cycle       Cycle        @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  options     Option[]
  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]

  @@index([cycleId, type, sortOrder])
}

model Option {
  id          String             @id @default(cuid())
  questionId  String
  label       String
  description String
  score       Decimal
  sortOrder   Int
  question    Question           @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]

  @@index([questionId, sortOrder])
}

model Evaluation {
  id                String             @id @default(cuid())
  cycleId           String
  evaluatedId       String
  managerId         String?
  status            EvaluationStatus   @default(PENDING)
  selfScore         Decimal?           @default(0)
  managerScore      Decimal?           @default(0)
  finalScore        Decimal?           @default(0)
  version           Int                @default(1)
  current           Boolean            @default(true)
  autoSubmittedAt   DateTime?
  managerSubmittedAt DateTime?
  archivedAt        DateTime?
  reopenedAt        DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime           @updatedAt
  cycle             Cycle              @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  evaluated         UserCycle          @relation("EvaluatedUser", fields: [evaluatedId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  manager           UserCycle?         @relation("ManagerUser", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  answers           EvaluationAnswer[]
  documents         Document[]

  @@index([cycleId, evaluatedId, current])
  @@index([cycleId, current, status])
}

model EvaluationAnswer {
  id               String          @id @default(cuid())
  evaluationId     String
  questionId       String
  selectedOptionId String
  phase            EvaluationPhase
  createdAt        DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime        @updatedAt
  evaluation       Evaluation      @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  question         Question        @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  selectedOption   Option          @relation(fields: [selectedOptionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([evaluationId, questionId, phase])
}

model Document {
  id           String         @id @default(cuid())
  evaluationId String
  name         String
  mimeType     String
  size         Int
  storageKey   String
  url          String
  status       DocumentStatus @default(UPLOADED)
  createdAt    DateTime       @default(now())
  evaluation   Evaluation     @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([evaluationId, createdAt])
}

"use server";

import {
  CycleStatus,
  EmploymentType,
  EvaluationPhase,
  EvaluationStatus,
  Prisma,
  QuestionType,
  SystemRole,
} from "@prisma/client";
import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache";
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
import { z } from "zod";

import {
  clearSession,
  createSession,
  getSessionContext,
  routeForRole,
  verifyCredentials,
  verifyGlobalRhCredentials,
} from "@/lib/auth";
import {
  calculateScore,
  canAutosave,
  getDeadline,
  getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType,
  resolveFinalStatus,
} from "@/lib/evaluation";
import { cloneQuestionSet, decimalToNumber, ensureCurrentEvaluation, getEvaluationWithRelations } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import { getDefaultOptions, QUESTION_BANK } from "@/lib/question-bank";
import { checkRateLimit, clearAttempts, recordFailedAttempt } from "@/lib/rate-limit";
import { storeDocumentInDrive } from "@/lib/storage";
import { parseXmlEmployees } from "@/lib/xml";

const loginSchema = z.object({
  cpf: z.string().min(11),
  password: z.string().min(11),
  year: z.coerce.number().int(),
});

export async function loginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const parsed = loginSchema.safeParse({
    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    year: formData.get("year"),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
  }

  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
  }

  const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);

  if (!result.ok) {
    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    return { error: result.message };
  }

  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (result.effectiveRole === SystemRole.RH) {
    await createSession(result.user.id, null);
    redirect("/rh");
  }

  await createSession(result.user.id, result.cycle.id);
  redirect(`/${parsed.data.year}/${routeForRole(result.effectiveRole)}`);
}

const globalLoginSchema = z.object({
  cpf: z.string().min(11),
  password: z.string().min(11),
});

export async function rhLoginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const parsed = globalLoginSchema.safeParse({
    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
  }

  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
  }

  const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);

  if (!result.ok) {
    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    return { error: result.message };
  }

  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
  await createSession(result.user.id, null);
  redirect("/rh");
}

export async function logoutAction(year?: number, redirectTo?: string) {
  await clearSession();
  redirect(redirectTo ?? `/${year}/login`);
}

const draftSchema = z.object({
  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
});

export async function saveDraftAction(input: z.infer<typeof draftSchema>) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = draftSchema.safeParse(input);

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Carga de rascunho inválida." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const deadline = getDeadline(evaluation.cycle.startDate, "self");

  if (!canAutosave(evaluation.status, deadline)) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Prazo encerrado para salvar rascunho." };
  }

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Rascunho não autorizado." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    for (const [questionId, optionId] of Object.entries(parsed.data.answers)) {
      await tx.evaluationAnswer.upsert({
        where: {
          evaluationId_questionId_phase: {
            evaluationId: evaluation.id,
            questionId,
            phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
          },
        },
        create: {
          evaluationId: evaluation.id,
          questionId,
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
          phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
        },
        update: {
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
        },
      });
    }

    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
      where: {
        id: {
          in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers),
        },
      },
    });

    const score = calculateScore(
      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
    );

    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        status: EvaluationStatus.DRAFT,
        selfScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
      },
    });
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);

  return { ok: true as const, message: "Alterações salvas automaticamente." };
}

const submitSchema = z.object({
  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
  phase: z.enum(["self", "manager"]),
  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
});

export async function submitEvaluationAction(input: z.infer<typeof submitSchema>) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = submitSchema.safeParse(input);

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Submissão inválida." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const phase = parsed.data.phase === "self" ? EvaluationPhase.SELF : EvaluationPhase.MANAGER;
  const isSelf = phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF;

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  if (isSelf && evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
  }

  if (!isSelf && evaluation.managerId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
  }


codex
Encontrei os dois `upsert` em loop dentro das transactions. Vou trocar por `deleteMany` + `createMany` preservando o filtro por fase e sem mexer no restante da lógica.
exec
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '260,380p' app/actions.ts" in /mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp
 succeeded in 0ms:

  const questionCount = await prisma.question.count({
    where: {
      cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      type: getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
    },
  });

  if (Object.keys(parsed.data.answers).length !== questionCount) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Preencha todos os fatores obrigatórios." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    for (const [questionId, optionId] of Object.entries(parsed.data.answers)) {
      await tx.evaluationAnswer.upsert({
        where: {
          evaluationId_questionId_phase: {
            evaluationId: evaluation.id,
            questionId,
            phase,
          },
        },
        create: {
          evaluationId: evaluation.id,
          questionId,
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
          phase,
        },
        update: {
          selectedOptionId: optionId,
        },
      });
    }

    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
      where: {
        id: { in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers) },
      },
    });

    const score = calculateScore(
      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
    );

    const nextStatus = resolveFinalStatus(evaluation.status, parsed.data.phase);

    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        status: nextStatus,
        selfScore: isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.selfScore,
        managerScore: !isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.managerScore,
        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(isSelf ? score : score),
        autoSubmittedAt: isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.autoSubmittedAt,
        managerSubmittedAt: !isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.managerSubmittedAt,
      },
    });
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/rh`);

  return { ok: true as const, redirectTo: `/${evaluation.cycle.year}/${isSelf ? "servidor" : "chefia"}` };
}

export async function uploadDocumentsAction(formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const evaluationId = String(formData.get("evaluationId") ?? "");
  const files = formData.getAll("files").filter((file): file is File => file instanceof File);

  if (!evaluationId || files.length === 0) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nenhum arquivo enviado." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  if ((evaluation.documents?.length ?? 0) + files.length > 10) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Limite máximo de 10 comprovantes por servidor." };
  }

  const uploaded = [];

  for (const file of files) {
    if (file.type !== "application/pdf") {
      return { ok: false as const, message: "Apenas arquivos PDF são permitidos." };
    }

    if (file.size > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
      return { ok: false as const, message: "Cada PDF deve ter no máximo 10MB." };
    }

    const sanitizedFileName =
      file.name
        .replace(/(\.\.(\/|\\|$))+/g, "")
        .replace(/[\\/]+/g, "")
        .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]/g, "")
        .replace(/\.{2,}/g, ".")

No arquivo app/actions.ts do projeto /mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp, otimize a funcao importXmlAction: (1) mova todos os bcrypt.hash para ANTES da abertura da transacao prisma — faca o hash de todos os CPFs em paralelo com Promise.all antes do prisma.$transaction; (2) substitua o employees.some() dentro do loop por um Set pre-computado antes da transacao: const managerCpfs = new Set(employees.filter(e => e.chefiaCpf).map(e => e.chefiaCpf)); (3) no segundo loop (vinculo de chefia e avaliacao), elimine os findUnique por funcionario — use o managerMap que ja existe para resolver todos os vinculos sem query adicional por funcionario. Rode npx tsc --noEmit ao final. Sem comentarios.

 succeeded in 0ms:
"use server";

import {
  CycleStatus,
  EmploymentType,
  EvaluationPhase,
  EvaluationStatus,
  Prisma,
  QuestionType,
  SystemRole,
} from "@prisma/client";
import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache";
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
import { z } from "zod";

import {
  clearSession,
  createSession,
  getSessionContext,
  routeForRole,
  verifyCredentials,
  verifyGlobalRhCredentials,
} from "@/lib/auth";
import {
  calculateScore,
  canAutosave,
  getDeadline,
  getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType,
  resolveFinalStatus,
} from "@/lib/evaluation";
import { cloneQuestionSet, decimalToNumber, ensureCurrentEvaluation, getEvaluationWithRelations } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import { getDefaultOptions, QUESTION_BANK } from "@/lib/question-bank";
import { checkRateLimit, clearAttempts, recordFailedAttempt } from "@/lib/rate-limit";
import { storeDocumentInDrive } from "@/lib/storage";
import { parseXmlEmployees } from "@/lib/xml";

const loginSchema = z.object({
  cpf: z.string().min(11),
  password: z.string().min(11),
  year: z.coerce.number().int(),
});

export async function loginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const parsed = loginSchema.safeParse({
    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    year: formData.get("year"),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
  }

  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
  }

  const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);

  if (!result.ok) {
    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    return { error: result.message };
  }

  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (result.effectiveRole === SystemRole.RH) {
    await createSession(result.user.id, null);
    redirect("/rh");
  }

  await createSession(result.user.id, result.cycle.id);
  redirect(`/${parsed.data.year}/${routeForRole(result.effectiveRole)}`);
}

const globalLoginSchema = z.object({
  cpf: z.string().min(11),
  password: z.string().min(11),
});

export async function rhLoginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const parsed = globalLoginSchema.safeParse({
    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
  }

  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);

  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
  }

  const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);

  if (!result.ok) {
    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    return { error: result.message };
  }

  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
  await createSession(result.user.id, null);
  redirect("/rh");
}

export async function logoutAction(year?: number, redirectTo?: string) {
  await clearSession();
  redirect(redirectTo ?? `/${year}/login`);
}

const draftSchema = z.object({
  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
});

export async function saveDraftAction(input: z.infer<typeof draftSchema>) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = draftSchema.safeParse(input);

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Carga de rascunho inválida." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const deadline = getDeadline(evaluation.cycle.startDate, "self");

  if (!canAutosave(evaluation.status, deadline)) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Prazo encerrado para salvar rascunho." };
  }

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Rascunho não autorizado." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    await tx.evaluationAnswer.deleteMany({
      where: {
        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
        phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
      },
    });

    await tx.evaluationAnswer.createMany({
      data: Object.entries(parsed.data.answers).map(([questionId, optionId]) => ({
        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
        questionId,
        selectedOptionId: optionId,
        phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
      })),
    });

    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
      where: {
        id: {
          in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers),
        },
      },
    });

    const score = calculateScore(
      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
    );

    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        status: EvaluationStatus.DRAFT,
        selfScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
      },
    });
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);

  return { ok: true as const, message: "Alterações salvas automaticamente." };
}

const submitSchema = z.object({
  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
  phase: z.enum(["self", "manager"]),
  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
});

export async function submitEvaluationAction(input: z.infer<typeof submitSchema>) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = submitSchema.safeParse(input);

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Submissão inválida." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const phase = parsed.data.phase === "self" ? EvaluationPhase.SELF : EvaluationPhase.MANAGER;
  const isSelf = phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF;

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  if (isSelf && evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
  }

  if (!isSelf && evaluation.managerId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
  }

  const questionCount = await prisma.question.count({
    where: {
      cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      type: getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
    },

export async function importXmlAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const cycleId = String(formData.get("cycleId") ?? "");
  const xmlFile = formData.get("xml");

  if (!cycleId || !(xmlFile instanceof File)) {
    return { error: "Envie um arquivo XML válido." };
  }

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: cycleId } });

  if (!cycle) {
    return { error: "Ciclo não encontrado." };
  }

  const xml = await xmlFile.text();
  const employees = parseXmlEmployees(xml);

  if (employees.length === 0) {
    return { error: "Nenhum registro reconhecido no XML." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    const managerMap = new Map();

    for (const employee of employees) {
      const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(employee.cpf, 10);
      const user = await tx.user.upsert({
        where: { cpf: employee.cpf },
        create: {
          cpf: employee.cpf,
          name: employee.nome,
          registration: employee.matricula,
          passwordHash,
        },
        update: {
          name: employee.nome,
          registration: employee.matricula,
        },
      });

      const isManager = employees.some((candidate) => candidate.chefiaCpf === employee.cpf);
      const employmentType =
        employee.vinculo.toUpperCase().includes("PROB") ? EmploymentType.PROBATORIO : EmploymentType.EFETIVO;

      const userCycle = await tx.userCycle.upsert({
        where: {
          userId_cycleId: {
            userId: user.id,
            cycleId,
          },
        },
        create: {
          userId: user.id,
          cycleId,
          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
          department: employee.secretaria,
          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
        },
        update: {
          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
          department: employee.secretaria,
          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
        },
      });

      managerMap.set(employee.cpf, userCycle.id);
    }

    for (const employee of employees) {
      if (!employee.chefiaCpf) {
        continue;
      }

      const employeeUser = await tx.user.findUnique({ where: { cpf: employee.cpf } });
      const employeeCycle = employeeUser
        ? await tx.userCycle.findUnique({
            where: {
              userId_cycleId: {
                userId: employeeUser.id,
                cycleId,
              },
            },
          })
        : null;

      if (!employeeCycle) {
        continue;
      }

      await tx.userCycle.update({
        where: { id: employeeCycle.id },
        data: {
          managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
        },
      });

      const existingEvaluation = await tx.evaluation.findFirst({
        where: {
          cycleId,
          evaluatedId: employeeCycle.id,
          current: true,
        },
      });

      if (existingEvaluation) {
        await tx.evaluation.update({
          where: { id: existingEvaluation.id },
          data: {
            managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
          },
        });
      } else {
        await tx.evaluation.create({
          data: {
            cycleId,
            evaluatedId: employeeCycle.id,
            managerId: managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null,
            status: EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
          },
        });
      }
    }
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
  revalidatePath("/rh");
  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
  return { success: `${employees.length} registro(s) importado(s) com sucesso.` };
}

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return;
  }

  const evaluation = await prisma.evaluation.findUnique({
    where: { id: evaluationId },
    include: {
      answers: true,
      documents: true,

codex
Ajustei `importXmlAction` em [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts) nos três pontos pedidos: `bcrypt.hash` agora roda antes da transação com `Promise.all`, o teste de chefia usa `managerCpfs` pré-computado, e o segundo loop passou a usar mapas montados no primeiro loop em vez de `findUnique` por funcionário.

Validação: `npx tsc --noEmit` executou com sucesso.

No arquivo app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx do projeto /mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp, corrija dois problemas: (1) N+1: a pagina chama ensureCurrentEvaluation para cada subordinado individualmente dentro de um loop ou Promise.all — substitua por uma unica query que busca todas as avaliacoes correntes dos subordinados de uma vez (findMany com evaluatedId: { in: subordinadoIds } e current: true), e so crie as que estiverem faltando em lote; (2) selects desnecessarios: troque os includes sem select por selects minimos — para user precisa apenas name e registration, para evaluations precisa apenas id, status, selfScore e version. Rode npx tsc --noEmit ao final. Sem comentarios.

 succeeded in 0ms:
import Link from "next/link";
import { SystemRole } from "@prisma/client";
import { notFound } from "next/navigation";

import { AppShell } from "@/components/app-shell";
import { LogoutButton } from "@/components/logout-button";
import { StatusBadge } from "@/components/status-badge";
import { requireSessionForYear } from "@/lib/auth";
import { ensureCurrentEvaluation } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
import { decimalToNumber } from "@/lib/evaluations-data";
import { canManagerEvaluate, getDeadline, getRemainingDays } from "@/lib/evaluation";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export default async function ChefiaPage({
  params,
}: {
  params: Promise<{ year: string }>;
}) {
  const { year } = await params;
  const cycleYear = Number(year);
  const context = await requireSessionForYear(cycleYear, SystemRole.MANAGER);

  if (!context.userCycle) {
    notFound();
  }

  if (!context.cycle) {
    notFound();
  }

  const managerUserCycle = context.userCycle;
  const cycle = context.cycle;

  const subordinates = await prisma.userCycle.findMany({
    where: {
      managerId: managerUserCycle.id,
      cycleId: cycle.id,
      role: SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
    },
    include: {
      user: true,
      evaluations: {
        where: { current: true },
      },
    },
    orderBy: { user: { name: "asc" } },
  });

  const hydratedSubordinates = await Promise.all(
    subordinates.map(async (item) => {
      const evaluation =
        item.evaluations[0] ??
        (await ensureCurrentEvaluation({
          cycleId: cycle.id,
          evaluatedId: item.id,
          managerId: managerUserCycle.id,
        }));

      return {
        ...item,
        evaluations: [evaluation],
      };
    }),
  );

  const total = hydratedSubordinates.length;
  const completed = hydratedSubordinates.filter((item) => item.evaluations[0]?.status === "COMPLETED").length;
  const pending = total - completed;

  return (
    <AppShell
      actions={<LogoutButton year={cycleYear} />}
      currentPath={`/${cycleYear}/chefia`}
      navItems={[{ href: `/${cycleYear}/chefia`, label: "Painel de Avaliação" }]}
      subtitle="Chefia Imediata"
      title="Nomos"
      userMeta={`${managerUserCycle.jobTitle} · ${managerUserCycle.department}`}
      userName={context.user.name}
    >
      <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-3">
        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Total de subordinados</p>
          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary">{total}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Avaliações pendentes</p>
          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-error">{pending}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Concluídas</p>
          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary-container">{completed}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <section className="institutional-card mt-8 overflow-hidden">
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="w-full min-w-[860px] text-left">
            <thead className="bg-surface-container-low text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-on-surface-variant">
              <tr>
                <th className="px-6 py-4">Servidor</th>
                <th className="px-6 py-4">Vínculo</th>
                <th className="px-6 py-4">Status</th>
                <th className="px-6 py-4">Prazo chefia</th>
                <th className="px-6 py-4">Autoavaliação</th>
                <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Ações</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {hydratedSubordinates.map((item) => {
                const evaluation = item.evaluations[0];
                const status = evaluation?.status ?? "PENDING";
                const selfScore = decimalToNumber(evaluation?.selfScore);
                const deadline = getDeadline(cycle.startDate, "manager");
                const canEvaluate = canManagerEvaluate(status);

                return (
                  <tr className="border-t border-transparent hover:bg-surface-container-low/30" key={item.id}>
                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
                      <p className="font-bold text-on-surface">{item.user.name}</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-on-surface-variant">Mat. {item.user.registration}</p>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
                      <span className="rounded-full bg-surface-container px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold text-on-secondary-container">
                        {item.employmentType}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
                      <StatusBadge status={status} />
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
                      {getRemainingDays(deadline)} dias restantes
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
                      {selfScore > 0 ? `${selfScore.toFixed(2)} pts` : "Aguardando envio"}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-right">
                      {canEvaluate ? (
                        <Link
                          className="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-institutional-gradient px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-on-primary"
                          href={`/${cycleYear}/chefia/avaliacoes/${evaluation?.id}`}
                        >
                          Avaliar agora
                        </Link>
                      ) : (
                        <div className="inline-flex flex-col items-end gap-1">
                          <span className="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-surface-container px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-on-surface-variant">
                            Bloqueado
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-[11px] text-on-surface-variant">
                            Aguardando autoavaliação
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                );
              })}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </section>
    </AppShell>
  );
}

import { EvaluationStatus, Prisma } from "@prisma/client";

import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export async function ensureCurrentEvaluation(input: {
  cycleId: string;
  evaluatedId: string;
  managerId?: string | null;
}) {
  const existing = await prisma.evaluation.findFirst({
    where: {
      cycleId: input.cycleId,
      evaluatedId: input.evaluatedId,
      current: true,
    },
  });

  if (existing) {
    return existing;
  }

  return prisma.evaluation.create({
    data: {
      cycleId: input.cycleId,
      evaluatedId: input.evaluatedId,
      managerId: input.managerId ?? null,
      status: EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
    },
  });
}

export async function getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId: string) {
  return prisma.evaluation.findUnique({
    where: { id: evaluationId },
    include: {
      cycle: true,
      documents: {
        orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      },
      evaluated: {
        include: {
          user: true,
          manager: {
            include: {
              user: true,
            },
          },
        },
      },
      manager: {
        include: {
          user: true,
        },
      },
      answers: {
        include: {
          question: {
            include: {
              options: {
                orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" },
              },
            },
          },
          selectedOption: true,
        },
      },
    },
  });
}

export async function cloneQuestionSet(sourceCycleId: string, targetCycleId: string) {
  const questions = await prisma.question.findMany({
    where: { cycleId: sourceCycleId },
    include: { options: { orderBy: { sortOrder: "asc" } } },
    orderBy: [{ type: "asc" }, { sortOrder: "asc" }],
  });

  for (const question of questions) {
    await prisma.question.create({
      data: {
        cycleId: targetCycleId,
        type: question.type,
        title: question.title,
        description: question.description,
        sortOrder: question.sortOrder,
        options: {
          create: question.options.map((option) => ({
            label: option.label,
            description: option.description,
            score: option.score,
            sortOrder: option.sortOrder,
          })),
        },
      },
    });
  }
}

export function decimalToNumber(value: Prisma.Decimal | number | null | undefined): number {
  return value ? Number(value) : 0;
}

 succeeded in 0ms:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum SystemRole {
  RH
  MANAGER
  EMPLOYEE
}

enum EmploymentType {
  EFETIVO
  PROBATORIO
}

enum EvaluationPhase {
  SELF
  MANAGER
}

enum QuestionType {
  BASE_60
  BASE_50
}

enum EvaluationStatus {
  PENDING
  DRAFT
  AUTO_DONE
  MANAGER_DONE
  COMPLETED
  ARCHIVED
}

enum DocumentStatus {
  PENDING
  UPLOADED
  FAILED
}

enum CycleStatus {
  OPEN
  COMPLETED
}

model User {
  id           String      @id @default(cuid())
  cpf          String      @unique
  name         String
  registration String      @unique
  passwordHash String
  globalRole   SystemRole?
  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt
  userCycles   UserCycle[]
  sessions     Session[]
}

model Cycle {
  id          String       @id @default(cuid())
  year        Int          @unique
  name        String
  startDate   DateTime
  endDate     DateTime
  status      CycleStatus  @default(OPEN)
  active      Boolean      @default(false)
  completedAt DateTime?
  createdAt   DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime     @updatedAt
  userCycles  UserCycle[]
  questions   Question[]
  evaluations Evaluation[]
  sessions    Session[]
}

model Session {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  token     String   @unique
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  userId    String
  cycleId   String?
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  cycle     Cycle?   @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model LoginAttempt {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  cpf       String
  ip        String   @default("unknown")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([cpf, createdAt])
}

model UserCycle {
  id             String         @id @default(cuid())
  userId         String
  cycleId        String
  role           SystemRole
  employmentType EmploymentType?
  department     String
  jobTitle       String
  managerId      String?
  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt
  user           User           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  cycle          Cycle          @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  manager        UserCycle?     @relation("Management", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  subordinates   UserCycle[]    @relation("Management")
  evaluations    Evaluation[]   @relation("EvaluatedUser")
  managerReviews Evaluation[]   @relation("ManagerUser")

  @@unique([userId, cycleId])
  @@index([cycleId, managerId, role])
}

model Question {
  id          String       @id @default(cuid())
  cycleId      String
  type        QuestionType
  title       String
  description String
  sortOrder   Int
  cycle       Cycle        @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  options     Option[]
  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]

  @@index([cycleId, type, sortOrder])
}

model Option {
  id          String             @id @default(cuid())
  questionId  String
  label       String
  description String
  score       Decimal
  sortOrder   Int
  question    Question           @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  answers     EvaluationAnswer[]

  @@index([questionId, sortOrder])
}

model Evaluation {
  id                String             @id @default(cuid())
  cycleId           String
  evaluatedId       String
  managerId         String?
  status            EvaluationStatus   @default(PENDING)
  selfScore         Decimal?           @default(0)
  managerScore      Decimal?           @default(0)
  finalScore        Decimal?           @default(0)
  version           Int                @default(1)
  current           Boolean            @default(true)
  autoSubmittedAt   DateTime?
  managerSubmittedAt DateTime?
  archivedAt        DateTime?
  reopenedAt        DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime           @updatedAt
  cycle             Cycle              @relation(fields: [cycleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  evaluated         UserCycle          @relation("EvaluatedUser", fields: [evaluatedId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  manager           UserCycle?         @relation("ManagerUser", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  answers           EvaluationAnswer[]
  documents         Document[]

  @@index([cycleId, evaluatedId, current])
  @@index([cycleId, current, status])
}

model EvaluationAnswer {
  id               String          @id @default(cuid())
  evaluationId     String
  questionId       String
  selectedOptionId String
  phase            EvaluationPhase
  createdAt        DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime        @updatedAt
  evaluation       Evaluation      @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  question         Question        @relation(fields: [questionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  selectedOption   Option          @relation(fields: [selectedOptionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([evaluationId, questionId, phase])
}

model Document {
  id           String         @id @default(cuid())
  evaluationId String
  name         String
  mimeType     String
  size         Int
  storageKey   String
  url          String
  status       DocumentStatus @default(UPLOADED)
  createdAt    DateTime       @default(now())
  evaluation   Evaluation     @relation(fields: [evaluationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([evaluationId, createdAt])
}
