  if (Object.keys(parsed.data.answers).length !== questionCount) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Preencha todos os fatores obrigatórios." };
  }

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    await tx.evaluationAnswer.deleteMany({
      where: {
        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
        phase,
      },
    });

    await tx.evaluationAnswer.createMany({
      data: Object.entries(parsed.data.answers).map(([questionId, optionId]) => ({
        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
        questionId,
        selectedOptionId: optionId,
        phase,
      })),
    });

    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
      where: {
        id: { in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers) },
      },
      select: {
        id: true,
        label: true,
      },
    });

    const score = calculateScore(
      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
    );

    const nextStatus = resolveFinalStatus(evaluation.status, parsed.data.phase);

    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        status: nextStatus,
        selfScore: isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.selfScore,
        managerScore: !isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.managerScore,
        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(isSelf ? score : score),
        autoSubmittedAt: isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.autoSubmittedAt,
        managerSubmittedAt: !isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.managerSubmittedAt,
      },
    });
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);
  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/rh`);

  return { ok: true as const, redirectTo: `/${evaluation.cycle.year}/${isSelf ? "servidor" : "chefia"}` };
}

export async function uploadDocumentsAction(formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (!sessionContext) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const evaluationId = String(formData.get("evaluationId") ?? "");
  const files = formData.getAll("files").filter((file): file is File => file instanceof File);

  if (!evaluationId || files.length === 0) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nenhum arquivo enviado." };
  }

  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId);

  if (!evaluation) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
  }

  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    where: {
      userId_cycleId: {
        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
      },
    },
  });

  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  if ((evaluation.documents?.length ?? 0) + files.length > 10) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Limite máximo de 10 comprovantes por servidor." };
  }

  const uploaded = [];

  for (const file of files) {
    if (file.type !== "application/pdf") {
      return { ok: false as const, message: "Apenas arquivos PDF são permitidos." };
    }

    if (file.size > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
      return { ok: false as const, message: "Cada PDF deve ter no máximo 10MB." };
    }

    const sanitizedFileName =
      file.name
        .replace(/(\.\.(\/|\\|$))+/g, "")
        .replace(/[\\/]+/g, "")
        .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]/g, "")
        .replace(/\.{2,}/g, ".")
        .replace(/^\.+/, "") || "documento.pdf";

    const stored = await storeDocumentInDrive({
      buffer: Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer()),
      fileName: sanitizedFileName,
      cycleYear: evaluation.cycle.year,
      userFolder: `${evaluation.evaluated.user.name.replace(/\s+/g, "_")}_${evaluation.evaluated.user.registration.replace(/\s+/g, "")}`,
    });

    const document = await prisma.document.create({
      data: {
        evaluationId,
        name: sanitizedFileName,
        mimeType: file.type,
        size: file.size,
        storageKey: stored.storageKey,
        url: stored.url,
      },
    });

    uploaded.push({
      id: document.id,
      name: document.name,
      url: document.url,
      size: document.size,
    });
  }

  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
  return { ok: true as const, documents: uploaded };
}

const cycleSchema = z.object({
  year: z.coerce.number().int().min(2020).max(2100),
});

export async function createCycleAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const parsed = cycleSchema.safeParse({
    year: formData.get("year"),
  });

  if (!parsed.success) {
    return { error: "Ano do ciclo inválido." };
  }

  const existing = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { year: parsed.data.year } });

  if (existing) {
    return { error: "Já existe um ciclo para esse ano." };
  }

  const openCycle = await prisma.cycle.findFirst({
    where: { status: CycleStatus.OPEN },
    orderBy: { year: "desc" },
  });

  if (openCycle) {
    return {
      error: `Finalize o projeto ${openCycle.year} antes de criar um novo ciclo.`,
    };
  }

  const latestCycle = await prisma.cycle.findFirst({
    orderBy: { year: "desc" },
  });

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.create({
    data: {
      year: parsed.data.year,
      name: `Ciclo ${parsed.data.year}`,
      startDate: new Date(`${parsed.data.year}-04-01T00:00:00.000Z`),
      endDate: new Date(`${parsed.data.year}-04-30T23:59:59.999Z`),
      status: CycleStatus.OPEN,
      active: true,
    },
  });

  await prisma.cycle.updateMany({
    where: { NOT: { id: cycle.id } },
    data: { active: false },
  });

  if (latestCycle) {
    await cloneQuestionSet(latestCycle.id, cycle.id);
  } else {
    await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
      const questionBankEntries = Object.entries(QUESTION_BANK) as Array<
        [QuestionType, (typeof QUESTION_BANK)[QuestionType]]
      >;

      const questionsToCreate = questionBankEntries.flatMap(([type, questions]) =>
        questions.map((question: (typeof questions)[number], index: number) => ({
          cycleId: cycle.id,
          type,
          title: question.title,
          description: question.description,
          sortOrder: index + 1,
        })),
      );

      await tx.question.createMany({
        data: questionsToCreate,
      });

      const createdQuestions = await tx.question.findMany({
        where: { cycleId: cycle.id },
        select: {
          id: true,
          type: true,
          sortOrder: true,
        },
      });

      const questionIdByKey = new Map(
        createdQuestions.map((question) => [`${question.type}:${question.sortOrder}`, question.id]),
      );

      await tx.option.createMany({
        data: questionBankEntries.flatMap(([type, questions]) =>
          questions.flatMap((question: (typeof questions)[number], index: number) => {
            const questionId = questionIdByKey.get(`${type}:${index + 1}`);

            if (!questionId) {
              throw new Error("Pergunta criada não encontrada.");
            }

            return getDefaultOptions(type).map((option, optionIndex) => ({
              questionId,
              label: option.label,
              score: option.score,
              description: question.options[optionIndex],
              sortOrder: optionIndex + 1,
            }));
          }),
        ),
      });

 succeeded in 0ms:
    });
  }

  revalidatePath(`/${parsed.data.year}/rh`);
  revalidatePath("/rh");
  return { success: `Ciclo ${parsed.data.year} criado com sucesso.` };
}

export async function importXmlAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const cycleId = String(formData.get("cycleId") ?? "");
  const xmlFile = formData.get("xml");

  if (!cycleId || !(xmlFile instanceof File)) {
    return { error: "Envie um arquivo XML válido." };
  }

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: cycleId } });

  if (!cycle) {
    return { error: "Ciclo não encontrado." };
  }

  const xml = await xmlFile.text();
  const employees = parseXmlEmployees(xml);

  if (employees.length === 0) {
    return { error: "Nenhum registro reconhecido no XML." };
  }

  const managerCpfs = new Set(employees.filter((employee) => employee.chefiaCpf).map((employee) => employee.chefiaCpf));
  const passwordHashes = await Promise.all(employees.map((employee) => bcrypt.hash(employee.cpf, 10)));

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    const managerMap = new Map<string, string>();
    const employeeCycleMap = new Map<string, string>();

    for (const [index, employee] of employees.entries()) {
      const passwordHash = passwordHashes[index];
      const user = await tx.user.upsert({
        where: { cpf: employee.cpf },
        create: {
          cpf: employee.cpf,
          name: employee.nome,
          registration: employee.matricula,
          passwordHash,
        },
        update: {
          name: employee.nome,
          registration: employee.matricula,
        },
      });

      const isManager = managerCpfs.has(employee.cpf);
      const employmentType =
        employee.vinculo.toUpperCase().includes("PROB") ? EmploymentType.PROBATORIO : EmploymentType.EFETIVO;

      const userCycle = await tx.userCycle.upsert({
        where: {
          userId_cycleId: {
            userId: user.id,
            cycleId,
          },
        },
        create: {
          userId: user.id,
          cycleId,
          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
          department: employee.secretaria,
          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
        },
        update: {
          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
          department: employee.secretaria,
          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
        },
      });

      managerMap.set(employee.cpf, userCycle.id);
      employeeCycleMap.set(employee.cpf, userCycle.id);
    }

    for (const employee of employees) {
      if (!employee.chefiaCpf) {
        continue;
      }

      const employeeCycleId = employeeCycleMap.get(employee.cpf);

      if (!employeeCycleId) {
        continue;
      }

      const managerId = managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null;

      await tx.userCycle.update({
        where: { id: employeeCycleId },
        data: {
          managerId,
        },
      });

      const existingEvaluation = await tx.evaluation.findFirst({
        where: {
          cycleId,
          evaluatedId: employeeCycleId,
          current: true,
        },
      });

      if (existingEvaluation) {
        await tx.evaluation.update({
          where: { id: existingEvaluation.id },
          data: {
            managerId,
          },
        });
      } else {
        await tx.evaluation.create({
          data: {
            cycleId,
            evaluatedId: employeeCycleId,
            managerId,
            status: EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
          },
        });
      }
    }
  });

  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
  revalidatePath("/rh");
  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
  return { success: `${employees.length} registro(s) importado(s) com sucesso.` };
}

export async function requestReevaluationAction(evaluationId: string) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return;
  }

  const evaluation = await prisma.evaluation.findUnique({
    where: { id: evaluationId },
    include: {
      answers: true,
      documents: true,
    },
  });

  if (!evaluation) {
    return;
  }

  const selfAnswers = evaluation.answers.filter((answer) => answer.phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF);
  const hasSelfEvaluation =
    selfAnswers.length > 0 ||
    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE ||
    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE ||
    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED;

  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    await tx.evaluation.update({
      where: { id: evaluation.id },
      data: {
        current: false,
        status: EvaluationStatus.ARCHIVED,
        archivedAt: new Date(),
      },
    });

    await tx.evaluation.create({
      data: {
        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
        evaluatedId: evaluation.evaluatedId,
        managerId: evaluation.managerId,
        version: evaluation.version + 1,
        current: true,
        status: hasSelfEvaluation ? EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE : EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
        selfScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
        managerScore: new Prisma.Decimal(0),
        finalScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
        autoSubmittedAt: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.autoSubmittedAt ?? new Date() : null,
        managerSubmittedAt: null,
        reopenedAt: new Date(),
        answers: {
          create: selfAnswers.map((answer) => ({
            questionId: answer.questionId,
            selectedOptionId: answer.selectedOptionId,
            phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
          })),
        },
        documents: {
          create: evaluation.documents.map((document) => ({
            name: document.name,
            mimeType: document.mimeType,
            size: document.size,
            storageKey: document.storageKey,
            url: document.url,
            status: document.status,
          })),
        },
      },
    });
  });

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: evaluation.cycleId } });

  if (cycle) {
    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
    revalidatePath("/rh");
    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/servidor`);
  }
}

export async function completeCycleAction(cycleId: string) {
  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();

  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
  }

  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({
    where: { id: cycleId },
  });

  if (!cycle) {
    return { ok: false as const, message: "Projeto não encontrado." };
  }

  const pendingCount = await prisma.evaluation.count({
    where: {
      cycleId,
      current: true,
      status: {
        not: EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED,
      },
    },
  });

  if (pendingCount > 0) {
    return {
      ok: false as const,
      message: "Ainda existem avaliações pendentes. Finalize o ciclo somente após concluir todo o fluxo.",
    };
  }

  await prisma.cycle.update({
    where: { id: cycleId },
    data: {
      status: CycleStatus.COMPLETED,
      active: false,
      completedAt: new Date(),
    },
  });

  revalidatePath("/rh");
  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);

  return { ok: true as const, message: `Projeto ${cycle.year} finalizado.` };
}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import { EmploymentType, EvaluationStatus, QuestionType } from "@prisma/client";
     2	import { addDays, differenceInCalendarDays, isAfter, startOfDay } from "date-fns";
     3	
     4	export const SCORE_BY_TYPE = {
     5	  [QuestionType.BASE_50]: {
     6	    cap: 50,
     7	    weights: { A: 10, B: 8, C: 6, D: 3, E: 1 },
     8	  },
     9	  [QuestionType.BASE_60]: {
    10	    cap: 60,
    11	    weights: { A: 7.5, B: 6, C: 4, D: 2.25, E: 0.75 },
    12	  },
    13	} as const;
    14	
    15	export function getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(type: EmploymentType): QuestionType {
    16	  return type === EmploymentType.PROBATORIO ? QuestionType.BASE_50 : QuestionType.BASE_60;
    17	}
    18	
    19	export function getDeadlineDays(kind: "self" | "manager"): number {
    20	  return kind === "self" ? 15 : 17;
    21	}
    22	
    23	export function calculateScore(
    24	  type: QuestionType,
    25	  selectedLabels: string[],
    26	): number {
    27	  const config = SCORE_BY_TYPE[type];
    28	  const total = selectedLabels.reduce((sum, label) => {
    29	    const key = label as keyof typeof config.weights;
    30	    return sum + (config.weights[key] ?? 0);
    31	  }, 0);
    32	
    33	  return Number(Math.min(total, config.cap).toFixed(2));
    34	}
    35	
    36	export function getDeadline(startDate: Date, kind: "self" | "manager"): Date {
    37	  return addDays(startOfDay(startDate), getDeadlineDays(kind));
    38	}
    39	
    40	export function getRemainingDays(deadline: Date, now = new Date()): number {
    41	  return Math.max(differenceInCalendarDays(startOfDay(deadline), startOfDay(now)), 0);
    42	}
    43	
    44	export function isDeadlineExpired(deadline: Date, now = new Date()): boolean {
    45	  return isAfter(startOfDay(now), startOfDay(deadline));
    46	}
    47	
    48	export function canAutosave(status: EvaluationStatus, deadline: Date, now = new Date()): boolean {
    49	  if (
    50	    status === EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED ||
    51	    status === EvaluationStatus.ARCHIVED ||
    52	    status === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE
    53	  ) {
    54	    return false;
    55	  }
    56	
    57	  return !isDeadlineExpired(deadline, now);
    58	}
    59	
    60	export function canManagerEvaluate(
    61	  status: EvaluationStatus,
    62	): boolean {
    63	  if (status === EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED || status === EvaluationStatus.ARCHIVED) {
    64	    return false;
    65	  }
    66	
    67	  return status === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE;
    68	}
    69	
    70	export function isReadOnly(status: EvaluationStatus, phase: "self" | "manager"): boolean {
    71	  if (status === EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED || status === EvaluationStatus.ARCHIVED) {
    72	    return true;
    73	  }
    74	
    75	  if (phase === "self") {
    76	    return status === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE || status === EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE;
    77	  }
    78	
    79	  return status === EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE;
    80	}
    81	
    82	export function resolveFinalStatus(
    83	  currentStatus: EvaluationStatus,
    84	  phase: "self" | "manager",
    85	): EvaluationStatus {
    86	  if (phase === "self") {
    87	    return currentStatus === EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE
    88	      ? EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED
    89	      : EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE;
    90	  }
    91	
    92	  return currentStatus === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE
    93	    ? EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED
    94	    : EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE;
    95	}
    96	
    97	export function getClassification(score: number, type: QuestionType): 'SD' | 'AD' | 'AP' | 'NA' {
    98	  const cap = SCORE_BY_TYPE[type].cap;
    99	  const pct = cap > 0 ? score / cap : 0;
   100	  if (pct >= 0.9) return 'SD';
   101	  if (pct >= 0.7) return 'AD';
   102	  if (pct >= 0.4) return 'AP';
   103	  return 'NA';
   104	}

    47	    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    48	    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    49	    year: formData.get("year"),
    50	  });
    51	
    52	  if (!parsed.success) {
    53	    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
    54	  }
    55	
    56	  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);
    57	
    58	  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    59	    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  const result = await verifyCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password, parsed.data.year);
    63	
    64	  if (!result.ok) {
    65	    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
    66	    return { error: result.message };
    67	  }
    68	
    69	  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
    70	
    71	  if (result.effectiveRole === SystemRole.RH) {
    72	    await createSession(result.user.id, null);
    73	    redirect("/rh");
    74	  }
    75	
    76	  await createSession(result.user.id, result.cycle.id);
    77	  redirect(`/${parsed.data.year}/${routeForRole(result.effectiveRole)}`);
    78	}

    80	const globalLoginSchema = z.object({
    81	  cpf: z.string().min(11),
    82	  password: z.string().min(11),
    83	});
    84	
    85	export async function rhLoginAction(_prevState: { error?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
    86	  const parsed = globalLoginSchema.safeParse({
    87	    cpf: String(formData.get("cpf") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    88	    password: String(formData.get("password") ?? "").replace(/\D/g, ""),
    89	  });
    90	
    91	  if (!parsed.success) {
    92	    return { error: "Informe CPF e senha válidos." };
    93	  }
    94	
    95	  const rateLimit = await checkRateLimit(parsed.data.cpf);
    96	
    97	  if (rateLimit.blocked) {
    98	    return { error: "Conta bloqueada. Tente em 15 minutos." };
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  const result = await verifyGlobalRhCredentials(parsed.data.cpf, parsed.data.password);
   102	
   103	  if (!result.ok) {
   104	    await recordFailedAttempt(parsed.data.cpf);
   105	    return { error: result.message };
   106	  }
   107	
   108	  await clearAttempts(parsed.data.cpf);
   109	  await createSession(result.user.id, null);
   110	  redirect("/rh");
   111	}

   113	export async function logoutAction(year?: number, redirectTo?: string) {

   118	const draftSchema = z.object({
   119	  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
   120	  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
   121	});
   122	
   123	export async function saveDraftAction(input: z.infer<typeof draftSchema>) {
   124	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   125	
   126	  if (!sessionContext) {
   127	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   128	  }
   129	
   130	  const parsed = draftSchema.safeParse(input);
   131	
   132	  if (!parsed.success) {
   133	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Carga de rascunho inválida." };
   134	  }
   135	
   136	  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);
   137	
   138	  if (!evaluation) {
   139	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
   140	  }
   141	
   142	  const deadline = getDeadline(evaluation.cycle.startDate, "self");
   143	
   144	  if (!canAutosave(evaluation.status, deadline)) {
   145	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Prazo encerrado para salvar rascunho." };
   146	  }
   147	
   148	  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
   149	    where: {
   150	      userId_cycleId: {
   151	        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
   152	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   153	      },
   154	    },
   155	  });
   156	
   157	  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   158	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Rascunho não autorizado." };
   159	  }
   160	
   161	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   162	    await tx.evaluationAnswer.deleteMany({
   163	      where: {
   164	        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   165	        phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
   166	      },
   167	    });
   168	
   169	    await tx.evaluationAnswer.createMany({
   170	      data: Object.entries(parsed.data.answers).map(([questionId, optionId]) => ({
   171	        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   172	        questionId,
   173	        selectedOptionId: optionId,
   174	        phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
   175	      })),
   176	    });
   177	
   178	    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
   179	      where: {
   180	        id: {
   181	          in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers),
   182	        },
   183	      },
   184	      select: {
   185	        id: true,
   186	        label: true,
   187	      },
   188	    });
   189	
   190	    const score = calculateScore(
   191	      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
   192	      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
   193	    );
   194	
   195	    await tx.evaluation.update({
   196	      where: { id: evaluation.id },
   197	      data: {
   198	        status: EvaluationStatus.DRAFT,
   199	        selfScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
   200	        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(score),
   201	      },
   202	    });
   203	  });
   204	
   205	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
   206	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);
   207	
   208	  return { ok: true as const, message: "Alterações salvas automaticamente." };
   209	}
   210	
   211	const submitSchema = z.object({
   212	  evaluationId: z.string().min(1),
   213	  phase: z.enum(["self", "manager"]),
   214	  answers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
   215	});
   216	
   217	export async function submitEvaluationAction(input: z.infer<typeof submitSchema>) {
   218	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   219	
   220	  if (!sessionContext) {
   221	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   222	  }
   223	
   224	  const parsed = submitSchema.safeParse(input);
   225	
   226	  if (!parsed.success) {
   227	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Submissão inválida." };
   228	  }
   229	
   230	  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(parsed.data.evaluationId);
   231	
   232	  if (!evaluation) {
   233	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
   234	  }
   235	
   236	  const phase = parsed.data.phase === "self" ? EvaluationPhase.SELF : EvaluationPhase.MANAGER;
   237	  const isSelf = phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF;
   238	
   239	  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
   240	    where: {
   241	      userId_cycleId: {
   242	        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
   243	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   244	      },
   245	    },
   246	  });
   247	
   248	  if (!actorUserCycle) {
   249	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   250	  }
   251	
   252	  if (isSelf && evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   253	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
   254	  }
   255	
   256	  if (!isSelf && evaluation.managerId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   257	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Operação não autorizada." };
   258	  }
   259	
   260	  const questionCount = await prisma.question.count({
   261	    where: {
   262	      cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   263	      type: getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
   264	    },
   265	  });
   266	
   267	  if (Object.keys(parsed.data.answers).length !== questionCount) {
   268	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Preencha todos os fatores obrigatórios." };
   269	  }
   270	
   271	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   272	    await tx.evaluationAnswer.deleteMany({
   273	      where: {
   274	        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   275	        phase,
   276	      },
   277	    });
   278	
   279	    await tx.evaluationAnswer.createMany({
   280	      data: Object.entries(parsed.data.answers).map(([questionId, optionId]) => ({
   281	        evaluationId: evaluation.id,
   282	        questionId,
   283	        selectedOptionId: optionId,
   284	        phase,
   285	      })),
   286	    });
   287	
   288	    const selectedOptions = await tx.option.findMany({
   289	      where: {
   290	        id: { in: Object.values(parsed.data.answers) },
   291	      },
   292	      select: {
   293	        id: true,
   294	        label: true,
   295	      },
   296	    });
   297	
   298	    const score = calculateScore(
   299	      getQuestionTypeByEmploymentType(evaluation.evaluated.employmentType ?? EmploymentType.EFETIVO),
   300	      selectedOptions.map((option) => option.label),
   301	    );
   302	
   303	    const nextStatus = resolveFinalStatus(evaluation.status, parsed.data.phase);
   304	
   305	    await tx.evaluation.update({
   306	      where: { id: evaluation.id },
   307	      data: {
   308	        status: nextStatus,
   309	        selfScore: isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.selfScore,
   310	        managerScore: !isSelf ? new Prisma.Decimal(score) : evaluation.managerScore,
   311	        finalScore: new Prisma.Decimal(isSelf ? score : score),
   312	        autoSubmittedAt: isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.autoSubmittedAt,
   313	        managerSubmittedAt: !isSelf ? new Date() : evaluation.managerSubmittedAt,
   314	      },
   315	    });
   316	  });
   317	
   318	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
   319	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/chefia`);
   320	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/rh`);
   321	
   322	  return { ok: true as const, redirectTo: `/${evaluation.cycle.year}/${isSelf ? "servidor" : "chefia"}` };
   323	}
   324	
   325	export async function uploadDocumentsAction(formData: FormData) {
   326	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   327	
   328	  if (!sessionContext) {
   329	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   330	  }
   331	
   332	  const evaluationId = String(formData.get("evaluationId") ?? "");
   333	  const files = formData.getAll("files").filter((file): file is File => file instanceof File);
   334	
   335	  if (!evaluationId || files.length === 0) {
   336	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nenhum arquivo enviado." };
   337	  }
   338	
   339	  const evaluation = await getEvaluationWithRelations(evaluationId);
   340	
   341	  if (!evaluation) {
   342	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Avaliação não encontrada." };
   343	  }
   344	
   345	  const actorUserCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
   346	    where: {
   347	      userId_cycleId: {
   348	        userId: sessionContext.user.id,
   349	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   350	      },
   351	    },
   352	  });
   353	
   354	  if (!actorUserCycle || evaluation.evaluatedId !== actorUserCycle.id) {
   355	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Nao autorizado." };
   356	  }
   357	
   358	  if ((evaluation.documents?.length ?? 0) + files.length > 10) {
   359	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Limite máximo de 10 comprovantes por servidor." };
   360	  }
   361	
   362	  const uploaded = [];
   363	
   364	  for (const file of files) {
   365	    if (file.type !== "application/pdf") {
   366	      return { ok: false as const, message: "Apenas arquivos PDF são permitidos." };
   367	    }
   368	
   369	    if (file.size > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
   370	      return { ok: false as const, message: "Cada PDF deve ter no máximo 10MB." };
   371	    }
   372	
   373	    const sanitizedFileName =
   374	      file.name
   375	        .replace(/(\.\.(\/|\\|$))+/g, "")
   376	        .replace(/[\\/]+/g, "")
   377	        .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]/g, "")
   378	        .replace(/\.{2,}/g, ".")
   379	        .replace(/^\.+/, "") || "documento.pdf";
   380	
   381	    const stored = await storeDocumentInDrive({
   382	      buffer: Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer()),
   383	      fileName: sanitizedFileName,
   384	      cycleYear: evaluation.cycle.year,
   385	      userFolder: `${evaluation.evaluated.user.name.replace(/\s+/g, "_")}_${evaluation.evaluated.user.registration.replace(/\s+/g, "")}`,
   386	    });
   387	
   388	    const document = await prisma.document.create({
   389	      data: {
   390	        evaluationId,
   391	        name: sanitizedFileName,
   392	        mimeType: file.type,
   393	        size: file.size,
   394	        storageKey: stored.storageKey,
   395	        url: stored.url,
   396	      },
   397	    });
   398	
   399	    uploaded.push({
   400	      id: document.id,
   401	      name: document.name,
   402	      url: document.url,
   403	      size: document.size,
   404	    });
   405	  }
   406	
   407	  revalidatePath(`/${evaluation.cycle.year}/servidor`);
   408	  return { ok: true as const, documents: uploaded };
   409	}

   411	const cycleSchema = z.object({

   415	export async function createCycleAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
   416	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   417	
   418	  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   419	    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
   420	  }

    13	export default async function RhPage({
    14	  params,

    26	    notFound();
    27	  }

    29	  const [employees, evaluations] = await Promise.all([

    34	      },
    35	      select: {
    36	        id: true,
    37	        department: true,
    38	        jobTitle: true,

    40	          select: {

    42	            registration: true,
    43	          },
    44	        },

    78	      <section className="mb-8 flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-end lg:justify-between">

    90	        <div className="institutional-card p-8">

    13	export default async function ChefiaPage({
    14	  params,
    15	}: {
    16	  params: Promise<{ year: string }>;
    17	}) {
    18	  const { year } = await params;
    19	  const cycleYear = Number(year);
    20	  const context = await requireSessionForYear(cycleYear, SystemRole.MANAGER);
    21	
    22	  if (!context.userCycle) {
    23	    notFound();
    24	  }
    25	
    26	  if (!context.cycle) {
    27	    notFound();
    28	  }
    29	
    30	  const managerUserCycle = context.userCycle;
    31	  const cycle = context.cycle;
    32	
    33	  const subordinates = await prisma.userCycle.findMany({
    34	    where: {
    35	      managerId: managerUserCycle.id,
    36	      cycleId: cycle.id,
    37	      role: SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
    38	    },
    39	    select: {
    40	      id: true,
    41	      employmentType: true,
    42	      user: {
    43	        select: {
    44	          name: true,
    45	          registration: true,
    46	        },
    47	      },
    48	      evaluations: {
    49	        where: { current: true },
    50	        select: {
    51	          id: true,
    52	          status: true,
    53	          selfScore: true,
    54	          version: true,
    55	        },
    56	      },
    57	    },
    58	    orderBy: { user: { name: "asc" } },
    59	  });
    60	
    61	  const subordinateIds = subordinates.map((item) => item.id);
    62	  const existingEvaluations = subordinateIds.length
    63	    ? await prisma.evaluation.findMany({
    64	        where: {
    65	          cycleId: cycle.id,
    66	          evaluatedId: { in: subordinateIds },
    67	          current: true,
    68	        },
    69	        select: {
    70	          id: true,
    71	          evaluatedId: true,
    72	          status: true,
    73	          selfScore: true,
    74	          version: true,
    75	        },
    76	      })
    77	    : [];
    78	
    79	  const existingEvaluationIds = new Set(existingEvaluations.map((evaluation) => evaluation.evaluatedId));
    80	  const missingSubordinateIds = subordinateIds.filter((id) => !existingEvaluationIds.has(id));
    81	
    82	  if (missingSubordinateIds.length) {
    83	    await prisma.evaluation.createMany({
    84	      data: missingSubordinateIds.map((evaluatedId) => ({
    85	        cycleId: cycle.id,
    86	        evaluatedId,
    87	        managerId: managerUserCycle.id,
    88	      })),
    89	    });
    90	  }
    91	
    92	  const currentEvaluations =
    93	    missingSubordinateIds.length > 0
    94	      ? await prisma.evaluation.findMany({
    95	          where: {
    96	            cycleId: cycle.id,
    97	            evaluatedId: { in: subordinateIds },
    98	            current: true,
    99	          },
   100	          select: {
   101	            id: true,
   102	            evaluatedId: true,
   103	            status: true,
   104	            selfScore: true,
   105	            version: true,
   106	          },
   107	        })
   108	      : existingEvaluations;
   109	
   110	  const evaluationsBySubordinateId = new Map(
   111	    currentEvaluations.map((evaluation) => [evaluation.evaluatedId, evaluation]),
   112	  );
   113	
   114	  const hydratedSubordinates = subordinates.map((item) => ({
   115	    ...item,
   116	    evaluations: (() => {
   117	      const evaluation = evaluationsBySubordinateId.get(item.id);
   118	      return evaluation ? [evaluation] : [];
   119	    })(),
   120	  }));
   121	
   122	  const total = hydratedSubordinates.length;
   123	  const completed = hydratedSubordinates.filter((item) => item.evaluations[0]?.status === "COMPLETED").length;
   124	  const pending = total - completed;
   125	
   126	  return (
   127	    <AppShell
   128	      actions={<LogoutButton year={cycleYear} />}
   129	      currentPath={`/${cycleYear}/chefia`}
   130	      navItems={[{ href: `/${cycleYear}/chefia`, label: "Painel de Avaliação" }]}
   131	      subtitle="Chefia Imediata"
   132	      title="Nomos"
   133	      userMeta={`${managerUserCycle.jobTitle} · ${managerUserCycle.department}`}
   134	      userName={context.user.name}
   135	    >
   136	      <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-3">
   137	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
   138	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Total de subordinados</p>
   139	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary">{total}</p>
   140	        </div>
   141	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
   142	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Avaliações pendentes</p>
   143	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-error">{pending}</p>
   144	        </div>
   145	        <div className="institutional-card p-6">
   146	          <p className="text-sm text-on-surface-variant">Concluídas</p>
   147	          <p className="mt-3 font-headline text-5xl font-black text-primary-container">{completed}</p>
   148	        </div>
   149	      </div>
   150	
   151	      <section className="institutional-card mt-8 overflow-hidden">
   152	        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   153	          <table className="w-full min-w-[860px] text-left">
   154	            <thead className="bg-surface-container-low text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-on-surface-variant">
   155	              <tr>
   156	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Servidor</th>
   157	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Vínculo</th>
   158	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Status</th>
   159	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Prazo chefia</th>
   160	                <th className="px-6 py-4">Autoavaliação</th>
   161	                <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Ações</th>
   162	              </tr>
   163	            </thead>
   164	            <tbody>
   165	              {hydratedSubordinates.map((item) => {
   166	                const evaluation = item.evaluations[0];
   167	                const status = evaluation?.status ?? "PENDING";
   168	                const selfScore = decimalToNumber(evaluation?.selfScore);
   169	                const deadline = getDeadline(cycle.startDate, "manager");
   170	                const canEvaluate = canManagerEvaluate(status);
   171	
   172	                return (
   173	                  <tr className="border-t border-transparent hover:bg-surface-container-low/30" key={item.id}>
   174	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
   175	                      <p className="font-bold text-on-surface">{item.user.name}</p>
   176	                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-on-surface-variant">Mat. {item.user.registration}</p>
   177	                    </td>
   178	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
   179	                      <span className="rounded-full bg-surface-container px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold text-on-secondary-container">
   180	                        {item.employmentType}
   181	                      </span>
   182	                    </td>
   183	                    <td className="px-6 py-5">
   184	                      <StatusBadge status={status} />
   185	                    </td>
   186	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
   187	                      {getRemainingDays(deadline)} dias restantes
   188	                    </td>
   189	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-on-surface-variant">
   190	                      {selfScore > 0 ? `${selfScore.toFixed(2)} pts` : "Aguardando envio"}
   191	                    </td>
   192	                    <td className="px-6 py-5 text-right">
   193	                      {canEvaluate ? (
   194	                        <Link
   195	                          className="inline-flex min-h-11 rounded-lg bg-institutional-gradient px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-on-primary"
   196	                          href={`/${cycleYear}/chefia/avaliacoes/${evaluation?.id}`}
   197	                        >
   198	                          Avaliar agora
   199	                        </Link>
   200	                      ) : (
   201	                        <div className="inline-flex flex-col items-end gap-1">
   202	                          <span className="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-surface-container px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-on-surface-variant">
   203	                            Bloqueado
   204	                          </span>
   205	                          <span className="text-[11px] text-on-surface-variant">
   206	                            Aguardando autoavaliação
   207	                          </span>
   208	                        </div>
   209	                      )}
   210	                    </td>
   211	                  </tr>
   212	                );
   213	              })}
   214	            </tbody>
   215	          </table>
   216	        </div>
   217	      </section>
   218	    </AppShell>
   219	  );
   220	}

   462	  await prisma.cycle.updateMany({

   472	        [QuestionType, (typeof QUESTION_BANK)[QuestionType]]
   473	      >;
   474	
   475	      const questionsToCreate = questionBankEntries.flatMap(([type, questions]) =>
   476	        questions.map((question: (typeof questions)[number], index: number) => ({
   477	          cycleId: cycle.id,
   478	          type,
   479	          title: question.title,
   480	          description: question.description,
   481	          sortOrder: index + 1,
   482	        })),
   483	      );

   485	      await tx.question.createMany({
   486	        data: questionsToCreate,
   487	      });
   488	
   489	      const createdQuestions = await tx.question.findMany({
   490	        where: { cycleId: cycle.id },
   491	        select: {
   492	          id: true,
   493	          type: true,
   494	          sortOrder: true,
   495	        },
   496	      });
   497

   499	        createdQuestions.map((question) => [`${question.type}:${question.sortOrder}`, question.id]),
   500	      );

   503	        data: questionBankEntries.flatMap(([type, questions]) =>

   518	          }),
   519	        ),
   520	      });
   521	    });

   529	export async function importXmlAction(_prevState: { error?: string; success?: string } | undefined, formData: FormData) {
   530	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   531	
   532	  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   533	    return { error: "Nao autorizado." };
   534	  }
   535	
   536	  const cycleId = String(formData.get("cycleId") ?? "");
   537	  const xmlFile = formData.get("xml");
   538	
   539	  if (!cycleId || !(xmlFile instanceof File)) {
   540	    return { error: "Envie um arquivo XML válido." };
   541	  }
   542	
   543	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: cycleId } });
   544	
   545	  if (!cycle) {
   546	    return { error: "Ciclo não encontrado." };
   547	  }
   548	
   549	  const xml = await xmlFile.text();
   550	  const employees = parseXmlEmployees(xml);
   551	
   552	  if (employees.length === 0) {
   553	    return { error: "Nenhum registro reconhecido no XML." };
   554	  }
   555	
   556	  const managerCpfs = new Set(employees.filter((employee) => employee.chefiaCpf).map((employee) => employee.chefiaCpf));
   557	  const passwordHashes = await Promise.all(employees.map((employee) => bcrypt.hash(employee.cpf, 10)));
   558	
   559	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   560	    const managerMap = new Map<string, string>();
   561	    const employeeCycleMap = new Map<string, string>();
   562	
   563	    for (const [index, employee] of employees.entries()) {
   564	      const passwordHash = passwordHashes[index];
   565	      const user = await tx.user.upsert({
   566	        where: { cpf: employee.cpf },
   567	        create: {
   568	          cpf: employee.cpf,
   569	          name: employee.nome,
   570	          registration: employee.matricula,
   571	          passwordHash,
   572	        },
   573	        update: {
   574	          name: employee.nome,
   575	          registration: employee.matricula,
   576	        },
   577	      });
   578	
   579	      const isManager = managerCpfs.has(employee.cpf);
   580	      const employmentType =
   581	        employee.vinculo.toUpperCase().includes("PROB") ? EmploymentType.PROBATORIO : EmploymentType.EFETIVO;
   582	
   583	      const userCycle = await tx.userCycle.upsert({
   584	        where: {
   585	          userId_cycleId: {
   586	            userId: user.id,
   587	            cycleId,
   588	          },
   589	        },
   590	        create: {
   591	          userId: user.id,
   592	          cycleId,
   593	          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
   594	          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
   595	          department: employee.secretaria,
   596	          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
   597	        },
   598	        update: {
   599	          role: isManager ? SystemRole.MANAGER : SystemRole.EMPLOYEE,
   600	          employmentType: isManager ? null : employmentType,
   601	          department: employee.secretaria,
   602	          jobTitle: employee.cargo,
   603	        },
   604	      });
   605	
   606	      managerMap.set(employee.cpf, userCycle.id);
   607	      employeeCycleMap.set(employee.cpf, userCycle.id);
   608	    }
   609	
   610	    for (const employee of employees) {
   611	      if (!employee.chefiaCpf) {
   612	        continue;
   613	      }
   614	
   615	      const employeeCycleId = employeeCycleMap.get(employee.cpf);
   616	
   617	      if (!employeeCycleId) {
   618	        continue;
   619	      }
   620	
   621	      const managerId = managerMap.get(employee.chefiaCpf) ?? null;
   622	
   623	      await tx.userCycle.update({
   624	        where: { id: employeeCycleId },
   625	        data: {
   626	          managerId,
   627	        },
   628	      });
   629	
   630	      const existingEvaluation = await tx.evaluation.findFirst({
   631	        where: {
   632	          cycleId,
   633	          evaluatedId: employeeCycleId,
   634	          current: true,
   635	        },
   636	      });
   637	
   638	      if (existingEvaluation) {
   639	        await tx.evaluation.update({
   640	          where: { id: existingEvaluation.id },
   641	          data: {
   642	            managerId,
   643	          },
   644	        });
   645	      } else {
   646	        await tx.evaluation.create({
   647	          data: {
   648	            cycleId,
   649	            evaluatedId: employeeCycleId,
   650	            managerId,
   651	            status: EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
   652	          },
   653	        });
   654	      }
   655	    }
   656	  });
   657	
   658	  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
   659	  revalidatePath("/rh");
   660	  revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
   661	  return { success: `${employees.length} registro(s) importado(s) com sucesso.` };
   662	}
   663	
   664	export async function requestReevaluationAction(evaluationId: string) {
   665	  const sessionContext = await getSessionContext();
   666	
   667	  if (sessionContext?.user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   668	    return;
   669	  }
   670	
   671	  const evaluation = await prisma.evaluation.findUnique({
   672	    where: { id: evaluationId },
   673	    include: {
   674	      answers: true,
   675	      documents: true,
   676	    },
   677	  });
   678	
   679	  if (!evaluation) {
   680	    return;
   681	  }
   682	
   683	  const selfAnswers = evaluation.answers.filter((answer) => answer.phase === EvaluationPhase.SELF);
   684	  const hasSelfEvaluation =
   685	    selfAnswers.length > 0 ||
   686	    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE ||
   687	    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.MANAGER_DONE ||
   688	    evaluation.status === EvaluationStatus.COMPLETED;
   689	
   690	  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
   691	    await tx.evaluation.update({
   692	      where: { id: evaluation.id },
   693	      data: {
   694	        current: false,
   695	        status: EvaluationStatus.ARCHIVED,
   696	        archivedAt: new Date(),
   697	      },
   698	    });
   699	
   700	    await tx.evaluation.create({
   701	      data: {
   702	        cycleId: evaluation.cycleId,
   703	        evaluatedId: evaluation.evaluatedId,
   704	        managerId: evaluation.managerId,
   705	        version: evaluation.version + 1,
   706	        current: true,
   707	        status: hasSelfEvaluation ? EvaluationStatus.AUTO_DONE : EvaluationStatus.PENDING,
   708	        selfScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
   709	        managerScore: new Prisma.Decimal(0),
   710	        finalScore: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.selfScore : new Prisma.Decimal(0),
   711	        autoSubmittedAt: hasSelfEvaluation ? evaluation.autoSubmittedAt ?? new Date() : null,
   712	        managerSubmittedAt: null,
   713	        reopenedAt: new Date(),
   714	        answers: {
   715	          create: selfAnswers.map((answer) => ({
   716	            questionId: answer.questionId,
   717	            selectedOptionId: answer.selectedOptionId,
   718	            phase: EvaluationPhase.SELF,
   719	          })),
   720	        },
   721	        documents: {
   722	          create: evaluation.documents.map((document) => ({
   723	            name: document.name,
   724	            mimeType: document.mimeType,
   725	            size: document.size,
   726	            storageKey: document.storageKey,
   727	            url: document.url,
   728	            status: document.status,
   729	          })),
   730	        },
   731	      },
   732	    });
   733	  });
   734	
   735	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { id: evaluation.cycleId } });
   736	
   737	  if (cycle) {
   738	    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/rh`);
   739	    revalidatePath("/rh");
   740	    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/chefia`);
   741	    revalidatePath(`/${cycle.year}/servidor`);
   742	  }
   743	}
   744

   751

   755

   757	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Projeto não encontrado." };
   758	  }
   759

    24	async function getDriveCredentials(): Promise<ServiceAccountCredentials> {
    25	  const raw = process.env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_CREDENTIALS_JSON;
    26	
    27	  if (!raw) {
    28	    throw new Error("GOOGLE_DRIVE_CREDENTIALS_JSON nao definida");

    30	
    31	  const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Partial<ServiceAccountCredentials>;

    43	async function getDriveClient() {
    44	  if (cachedDrive) {
    45	    return cachedDrive;
    46	  }
    47

    52	    scopes: DRIVE_SCOPES,

    54	
    55	  cachedDrive = google.drive({
    56	    version: "v3",
    57	    auth,
    58	  });

    60	  return cachedDrive;

    70	  return {
    71	    supportsAllDrives: true,
    72	    includeItemsFromAllDrives: true,
    73	    driveId: sharedDriveId,
    74	    corpora: "drive" as const,
    75	  };
    76	}
    77	
    78	async function findOrCreateFolder(name: string, parentId: string) {
    79	  const drive = await getDriveClient();
    80	  const flags = getDriveFlags();
    81	  const query = [
    82	    `name = '${escapeDriveQueryValue(name)}'`,
    83	    `mimeType = '${FOLDER_MIME_TYPE}'`,
    84	    "trashed = false",
    85	    `'${escapeDriveQueryValue(parentId)}' in parents`,
    86	  ].join(" and ");
    87	
    88	  const existing = await drive.files.list({
    89	    ...flags,
    90	    q: query,
    91	    fields: "files(id, name)",
    92	    pageSize: 1,
    93	  });
    94	
    95	  const folderId = existing.data.files?.[0]?.id;
    96	
    97	  if (folderId) {
    98	    return folderId;
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  const created = await drive.files.create({
   102	    ...flags,
   103	    requestBody: {
   104	      name,
   105	      mimeType: FOLDER_MIME_TYPE,
   106	      parents: [parentId],
   107	    },
   108	    fields: "id",
   109	  });
   110	
   111	  if (!created.data.id) {
   112	    throw new Error(`Não foi possível criar a pasta '${name}' no Google Drive.`);
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  return created.data.id;
   116	}
   117	
   118	function getRootFolderId(): string {
   119	  const configured = process.env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_ROOT_FOLDER_ID?.trim();
   120	  return configured ? configured : "root";
   121	}
   122	
   123	function getCycleFolderName(cycleYear: number): string {
   124	  const prefix = process.env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_CYCLE_PREFIX?.trim();
   125	  return prefix
   126	    ? `${prefix} ${cycleYear}`
   127	    : `Avaliação ${cycleYear}`;
   128	}
   129	
   130	export async function storeDocumentInDrive(input: UploadInput) {
   131	  const drive = await getDriveClient();
   132	  const flags = getDriveFlags();
   133	  const cycleFolderId = await findOrCreateFolder(getCycleFolderName(input.cycleYear), getRootFolderId());
   134	  const userFolderId = await findOrCreateFolder(input.userFolder, cycleFolderId);
   135	
   136	  const upload = await drive.files.create({
   137	    ...flags,
   138	    requestBody: {
   139	      name: input.fileName,
   140	      parents: [userFolderId],
   141	    },
   142	    media: {
   143	      mimeType: "application/pdf",
   144	      body: Readable.from(input.buffer),
   145	    },
   146	    fields: "id, webViewLink, webContentLink, name",
   147	  });
   148	
   149	  const fileId = upload.data.id;
   150	
   151	  if (!fileId) {
   152	    throw new Error("Upload para o Google Drive falhou.");
   153	  }
   154	
   155	  return {
   156	    storageKey: fileId,
   157	    url: upload.data.webViewLink ?? upload.data.webContentLink ?? `https://drive.google.com/file/d/${fileId}/view`,
   158	  };
   159	}

     1	import { SystemRole } from "@prisma/client";
     2	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
     3	import { cookies } from "next/headers";
     4	import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
     5	import { randomUUID } from "crypto";
     6	
     7	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
     8	
     9	const SESSION_COOKIE = "nomos_session";
    10	
    11	export async function createSession(userId: string, cycleId?: string | null): Promise<void> {
    12	  const token = randomUUID();
    13	  const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 1000 * 60 * 60 * 12);
    14	
    15	  await prisma.session.create({
    16	    data: {
    17	      token,
    18	      userId,
    19	      cycleId: cycleId ?? null,
    20	      expiresAt,
    21	    },
    22	  });
    23	
    24	  const cookieStore = await cookies();
    25	  cookieStore.set(SESSION_COOKIE, token, {
    26	    httpOnly: true,
    27	    sameSite: "lax",
    28	    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === "production",
    29	    expires: expiresAt,
    30	    path: "/",
    31	  });
    32	}
    33	
    34	export async function clearSession(): Promise<void> {
    35	  const cookieStore = await cookies();
    36	  const token = cookieStore.get(SESSION_COOKIE)?.value;
    37	
    38	  if (token) {
    39	    await prisma.session.deleteMany({ where: { token } });
    40	  }
    41	
    42	  cookieStore.delete(SESSION_COOKIE);
    43	}
    44	
    45	export async function getSessionContext() {
    46	  const cookieStore = await cookies();
    47	  const token = cookieStore.get(SESSION_COOKIE)?.value;
    48	
    49	  if (!token) {
    50	    return null;
    51	  }
    52	
    53	  const session = await prisma.session.findUnique({
    54	    where: { token },
    55	    include: {
    56	      user: true,
    57	      cycle: true,
    58	    },
    59	  });
    60	
    61	  if (!session || session.expiresAt < new Date()) {
    62	    return null;
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  const userCycle = session.cycleId
    66	    ? await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
    67	        where: {
    68	          userId_cycleId: {
    69	            userId: session.userId,
    70	            cycleId: session.cycleId,
    71	          },
    72	        },
    73	      })
    74	    : null;
    75	
    76	  const effectiveRole = session.user.globalRole ?? userCycle?.role ?? null;
    77	
    78	  if (!effectiveRole) {
    79	    return null;
    80	  }
    81	
    82	  return {
    83	    session,
    84	    user: session.user,
    85	    cycle: session.cycle,
    86	    userCycle,
    87	    effectiveRole,
    88	  };
    89	}
    90	
    91	export async function requireSessionForYear(year: number, role?: SystemRole) {
    92	  const context = await getSessionContext();
    93	
    94	  if (!context || !context.cycle || context.cycle.year !== year) {
    95	    redirect(`/${year}/login`);
    96	  }
    97	
    98	  if (role && context.effectiveRole !== role) {
    99	    redirect(`/${year}/${routeForRole(context.effectiveRole)}`);
   100	  }
   101	
   102	  return context;
   103	}
   104	
   105	export async function requireGlobalRhSession() {
   106	  const context = await getSessionContext();
   107	
   108	  if (!context || context.effectiveRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   109	    redirect("/rh/login");
   110	  }
   111	
   112	  return context;
   113	}
   114	
   115	export async function verifyCredentials(cpf: string, password: string, year: number) {
   116	  const cycle = await prisma.cycle.findUnique({ where: { year } });
   117	
   118	  if (!cycle) {
   119	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Ciclo não encontrado." };
   120	  }
   121	
   122	  const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { cpf } });
   123	
   124	  if (!user) {
   125	    return { ok: false as const, message: "CPF não localizado." };
   126	  }
   127	
   128	  const userCycle = await prisma.userCycle.findUnique({
   129	    where: {
   130	      userId_cycleId: {
   131	        userId: user.id,
   132	        cycleId: cycle.id,
   133	      },
   134	    },
   135	  });
   136	
   137	  const effectiveRole = user.globalRole ?? userCycle?.role ?? null;
   138	
   139	  if (!effectiveRole) {
   140	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Usuário fora da base do ciclo selecionado." };
   141	  }
   142	
   143	  const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.passwordHash);
   144	
   145	  if (!valid) {
   146	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Credenciais inválidas." };
   147	  }
   148	
   149	  return { ok: true as const, user, cycle, userCycle, effectiveRole };
   150	}
   151	
   152	export async function verifyGlobalRhCredentials(cpf: string, password: string) {
   153	  const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { cpf } });
   154	
   155	  if (!user || user.globalRole !== SystemRole.RH) {
   156	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Usuário RH não localizado." };
   157	  }
   158	
   159	  const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.passwordHash);
   160	
   161	  if (!valid) {
   162	    return { ok: false as const, message: "Credenciais inválidas." };
   163	  }
   164	
   165	  return {
   166	    ok: true as const,
   167	    user,
   168	    effectiveRole: SystemRole.RH,
   169	  };
   170	}
   171	
   172	export function routeForRole(role: SystemRole): string {
   173	  if (role === SystemRole.RH) {
   174	    return "rh";
   175	  }
   176	
   177	  if (role === SystemRole.MANAGER) {
   178	    return "chefia";
   179	  }
   180	
   181	  return "servidor";
   182	}

     3	export const MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5;
     4	export const WINDOW_MINUTES = 15;
     5	
     6	function getWindowStart(now: Date = new Date()) {
     7	  return new Date(now.getTime() - WINDOW_MINUTES * 60 * 1000);
     8	}
     9	
    10	export async function checkRateLimit(cpf: string) {
    11	  const attempts = await prisma.loginAttempt.count({
    12	    where: {
    13	      cpf,
    14	      createdAt: {
    15	        gte: getWindowStart(),
    16	      },
    17	    },
    18	  });
    19	
    20	  return { blocked: attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS };
    21	}
    22	
    23	export async function recordFailedAttempt(cpf: string) {

    25	    data: {

    28	  });
    29	}
    30	
    31	export async function clearAttempts(cpf: string) {

    34	      cpf,
    35	    },
    36	  });
    37	}

    12	export default async function ManagerEvaluationPage({
    13	  params,
    14	}: {

    16	}) {

codex
- (A) SEGURANCA | Critica | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:217): `submitEvaluationAction` não valida prazo, estado atual, bloqueio de leitura nem pré-condição de autoavaliação antes de gravar. Qualquer cliente que invoque a server action diretamente consegue submeter ou sobrescrever avaliação fora da janela, reabrir fluxo já congelado e permitir avaliação de chefia sem a trava exigida pela interface.

- (A) SEGURANCA | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:364): O upload aceita qualquer arquivo cujo `Content-Type` seja `application/pdf`, sem checagem de assinatura real do PDF. Um request forjado consegue armazenar conteúdo arbitrário no Drive e no banco como se tivesse passado pela validação de formato.

- (A) SEGURANCA | Media | [lib/auth.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/auth.ts:118): As respostas de login distinguem “ciclo não encontrado”, “CPF não localizado”, “usuário fora da base” e “credenciais inválidas”. Isso expõe enumeração de usuários, ciclos e perfil RH para quem estiver testando credenciais.

- (A) SEGURANCA | Media | [lib/rate-limit.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/rate-limit.ts:10): O rate limit é aplicado só por CPF, embora o schema já tenha campo `ip`, e o IP nunca é gravado nem consultado. Isso deixa a aplicação sem contenção por origem e facilita varredura ampla de CPFs ou distribuição de tentativas sem bloqueio efetivo na fonte.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [lib/evaluation.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/evaluation.ts:36): O cálculo de prazo soma 15/17 dias ao `startDate` e só expira no início do dia seguinte, o que adiciona um dia inteiro ao limite real. Na prática, a autoavaliação e a avaliação da chefia ficam abertas além de 23:59 do 15º e do 17º dia exigidos pelas RN-04.1 e RN-04.2.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:451): `createCycleAction` ignora completamente o `startDate` enviado pelo RH e grava sempre `01/04` a `30/04` em UTC. Isso contradiz a RN-04.0, porque a data oficial do projeto não é a cadastrada pelo administrador e todos os cortes passam a depender de uma data fixa artificial.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:358): O backend limita cada arquivo a 10 MB e monta a pasta do Drive com `nome_matricula`, enquanto a regra exige 20 MB e pasta com o nome exato do servidor sem matrícula. O comportamento implementado contraria diretamente as RN-06.1 e RN-06.3.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:664): `requestReevaluationAction` permite abrir reavaliação mesmo sem existir uma primeira avaliação da chefia para preservar. Isso viola a RN-07.2, porque o sistema pode criar versão nova a partir de `PENDING` ou `AUTO_DONE`, sem histórico real de parecer original a ser mantido.

- (C) ERROS NAO MAPEADOS | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:169): Tanto no rascunho quanto no envio final, o código grava pares `questionId`/`selectedOptionId` vindos do cliente sem validar se a opção pertence à pergunta e ao questionário daquele ciclo. Isso permite estado inválido no banco com respostas logicamente incoerentes, mesmo quando as chaves estrangeiras continuam válidas isoladamente.

- (C) ERROS NAO MAPEADOS | Media | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:362): O loop de upload não tem tratamento transacional nem compensação para falha parcial entre Drive e banco. Se um arquivo intermediário falhar, os anteriores já ficam persistidos e a ação explode sem mensagem de negócio consistente, deixando o formulário em estado parcial.

- (D) PERFORMANCE | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:559): A importação XML faz `upsert` sequencial de usuário e `userCycle` para cada registro, depois percorre tudo de novo com mais `update/findFirst/create` dentro da mesma transação. Em bases anuais grandes isso alonga muito o tempo de importação e mantém lock transacional desnecessariamente alto.

- (D) PERFORMANCE | Media | [app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx:33): A tela da chefia busca avaliações embutidas em `userCycle.findMany`, depois consulta `evaluation.findMany` de novo para o mesmo conjunto e ainda pode refazer a leitura após `createMany`. Esse caminho duplica leituras do mesmo dado a cada render e aumenta o custo do painel sem ganho funcional.

- (A) SEGURANCA | Critica | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:217): `submitEvaluationAction` não valida prazo, estado atual, bloqueio de leitura nem pré-condição de autoavaliação antes de gravar. Qualquer cliente que invoque a server action diretamente consegue submeter ou sobrescrever avaliação fora da janela, reabrir fluxo já congelado e permitir avaliação de chefia sem a trava exigida pela interface.

- (A) SEGURANCA | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:364): O upload aceita qualquer arquivo cujo `Content-Type` seja `application/pdf`, sem checagem de assinatura real do PDF. Um request forjado consegue armazenar conteúdo arbitrário no Drive e no banco como se tivesse passado pela validação de formato.

- (A) SEGURANCA | Media | [lib/auth.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/auth.ts:118): As respostas de login distinguem “ciclo não encontrado”, “CPF não localizado”, “usuário fora da base” e “credenciais inválidas”. Isso expõe enumeração de usuários, ciclos e perfil RH para quem estiver testando credenciais.

- (A) SEGURANCA | Media | [lib/rate-limit.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/rate-limit.ts:10): O rate limit é aplicado só por CPF, embora o schema já tenha campo `ip`, e o IP nunca é gravado nem consultado. Isso deixa a aplicação sem contenção por origem e facilita varredura ampla de CPFs ou distribuição de tentativas sem bloqueio efetivo na fonte.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [lib/evaluation.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/lib/evaluation.ts:36): O cálculo de prazo soma 15/17 dias ao `startDate` e só expira no início do dia seguinte, o que adiciona um dia inteiro ao limite real. Na prática, a autoavaliação e a avaliação da chefia ficam abertas além de 23:59 do 15º e do 17º dia exigidos pelas RN-04.1 e RN-04.2.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:451): `createCycleAction` ignora completamente o `startDate` enviado pelo RH e grava sempre `01/04` a `30/04` em UTC. Isso contradiz a RN-04.0, porque a data oficial do projeto não é a cadastrada pelo administrador e todos os cortes passam a depender de uma data fixa artificial.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:358): O backend limita cada arquivo a 10 MB e monta a pasta do Drive com `nome_matricula`, enquanto a regra exige 20 MB e pasta com o nome exato do servidor sem matrícula. O comportamento implementado contraria diretamente as RN-06.1 e RN-06.3.

- (B) REGRAS DE NEGOCIO | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:664): `requestReevaluationAction` permite abrir reavaliação mesmo sem existir uma primeira avaliação da chefia para preservar. Isso viola a RN-07.2, porque o sistema pode criar versão nova a partir de `PENDING` ou `AUTO_DONE`, sem histórico real de parecer original a ser mantido.

- (C) ERROS NAO MAPEADOS | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:169): Tanto no rascunho quanto no envio final, o código grava pares `questionId`/`selectedOptionId` vindos do cliente sem validar se a opção pertence à pergunta e ao questionário daquele ciclo. Isso permite estado inválido no banco com respostas logicamente incoerentes, mesmo quando as chaves estrangeiras continuam válidas isoladamente.

- (C) ERROS NAO MAPEADOS | Media | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:362): O loop de upload não tem tratamento transacional nem compensação para falha parcial entre Drive e banco. Se um arquivo intermediário falhar, os anteriores já ficam persistidos e a ação explode sem mensagem de negócio consistente, deixando o formulário em estado parcial.

- (D) PERFORMANCE | Alta | [app/actions.ts](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/actions.ts:559): A importação XML faz `upsert` sequencial de usuário e `userCycle` para cada registro, depois percorre tudo de novo com mais `update/findFirst/create` dentro da mesma transação. Em bases anuais grandes isso alonga muito o tempo de importação e mantém lock transacional desnecessariamente alto.

- (D) PERFORMANCE | Media | [app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx](/mnt/c/Users/PC/Documents/projeto-pref-drp/app/[year]/chefia/page.tsx:33): A tela da chefia busca avaliações embutidas em `userCycle.findMany`, depois consulta `evaluation.findMany` de novo para o mesmo conjunto e ainda pode refazer a leitura após `createMany`. Esse caminho duplica leituras do mesmo dado a cada render e aumenta o custo do painel sem ganho funcional.
